64-king-the-memer.891.title: 64 King the Memer
64-king-the-memer.891.author: king the memer
64-king-the-memer.891.description:
Peach's letter somehow made it all the way to King who, being bored and having nothing better to do, happily went to the castle

... little did he know he'd spend hours scrambling for stars, all to find a complete fucking random
​

INFO:

After four long years of development (and two and a half lacking releases) King is finally complete - quicker and bouncier than ever before

He can run and roll down hills to gain real momentum, manouver through tough obstacles with ease, fly across the map with good timing, and so much more

With cool new moves like the Rolldash [Z + B], Bubble Bounce [Z + B] and Airjump [Z + A], King is a fun, simple to learn character with incredible potential when mastered

NOTES:

- This mod is split into two parts: the campaign, 
64 King the Memer
, and the character, 
King

- King
 the character does NOT require or support 
Character Select
 - if detected, all functionality will be disabled to avoid the game becoming completely unplayable (hopefully support can be added in the future but as of now the two clash too harshly)

- Included with 
King
 are two 
kSkins
, Sonic the Hedgehog and Bootleg Metal Sonic - You can change your kSkin or switch back to Mario through the pause menu

- All major previous builds are located 
here

aight enough yap im admitedly fucking horrible at releasing anything stable, theres prolly a ton of bugs i js didnt find through my own testing so at least for now try report anything weird 
directly to me
 rather than telling me through lowered reviews (i seen that happen to alot of people it does NOT help) - id keep searching for things to iron out but thatd take me like five more years and by then i woulda burned my ass out and hit another shadow drop like i did with the first remake back in 23, and id bet alot that nobody even heard about that build

but ye apart from that i do hope yall enjoy this, its def nothing crazy but i put in alot of hours to make sure everything is smooth and fits w the original - its gonna be real weird not being on the grind after so long

afker.1182.title: AFKer
afker.1182.author: codeflex
afker.1182.description:
AFKer 2.0

Category: Administrative/Utility

Description: Ever wanted to take a quick break without getting trolled? How about sitting back and watching the skills of a better player? Or maybe you just want to watch your friend fail that jump over and over?Then AFKer is the mod for you!With a quick press of DPAD LEFT, your character will go into a transparent, intangible, invincible AFK mode! While AFKing, you can press DPAD UP or DPAD DOWN to cycle your camera view between other players in the same level, with independent full camera control!

Press DPAD UP and DOWN while AFK to cycle through other players in that level

Pressing DPAD LEFT while in AFK will cycle between different poses

While AFK, the name of the current romhack is displayed

Text indicator when other players are spectating you

Taking any action disables AFK mode immediately

A 10 second cooldown between activations to prevent abuse

Relevant error, confirmation, and other helpful text shouts

If a player being spectated leaves the level, dies, enters a cannon or engages a cutscene, spectate mode will cycle back to your character

Server wide shouts for players entering or leaving AFK, with a tiny list of AFKing players in the top lefthand corner

AFK mode can only be activated while standing on the ground

Compatibility with 'L for Gangnam Style' mod; press L while AFK to toggle!

2.0 in action: 

Download link: 
AFKer.lua

an-ordinary-coop-mod.391.author: Blocky
an-ordinary-coop-mod.391.description:
This was planned to be released on Halloween

its a bit late but whateverThis mod has two seperate "modes",

-Vanilla game

-Dark mode

When the game goes dark you won't be able to collect stars or keys,

you must collect 25 coins (or more depending on the player count) in order to make the game turn back to Vanilla, 

personally managed to get 70 stars with a group of friends so a full playthrough is of course possible

This mod is only compatible with Vanilla, and will be in the "Romhacks" tab when you'll want to select it

There is also an "entity" that will chase you in levels at night (off by default), to enable it do /aocm

arena-facing-castles.652.title: Arena - Facing Castles
arena-facing-castles.652.author: BuckleyTim
arena-facing-castles.652.description:
I've had this map idea for a long time and thankfully I finally got the time set aside to make it reality.

Facing Castles is an Arena map made specifically for CTF (you can try the other modes on this map but they won't play well, if arena ever gives me the ability to lock off game modes per level i'll probably do that to save me a headache or two). As many can tell, it's inspired by UT's Facing Worlds, but it's not a 1:1 recreation. Instead, this map tries to emulate the vibe level design wise (and music wise, as the music included is Splash Canyon from Sonic Riders - breakbeats 4 lyfe <3)

The result is a ctf level design that some might hate but others will love. Either way, I hope y'all get some kind of enjoyment out of this remix of the most iconic location from the n64!

arena-hangout-bitforts.7.title: Arena (& Hangout) - Bitforts
arena-hangout-bitforts.7.author: Chilly
arena-hangout-bitforts.7.description:
This is 
Bitforts
, an Arena & Hangout map for your preferred version of sm64coop. (it works on both)

Be mindful of which version you download
, as one is specifically for Arena (included with your game) and the other is for Hangout (which isn't a real gamemode, but something you can add onto your game).

The Arena version automatically adds itself to the map pool through its api, but for those using the Hangout version, a very simple implementation is provided to allow people to access the map through the 
/retrowarp
 command. Feel free to change the Hangout version's way of warping there to better fit your server!

I made the map, but special thanks goes out to 
flipflopbell
 for their 3D Skybox Template, which I used for this.

arena-hangout-thps-1-warehouse.31.title: Arena (& Hangout) - THPS 1 - Warehouse
arena-hangout-thps-1-warehouse.31.author: BuckleyTim
arena-hangout-thps-1-warehouse.31.description:
The iconic first level from the (n64 version specifically) of the first Tony Hawk's Pro Skater is now available to explore in Super Mario 64 PC Coop, in 2 forms nonetheless!

This mod comes with both a Hangout and an Arena version!

Hangout

 Not too much to say about the hangout version: it's the original stage ported to this game, with a recovery heart and wing cap box to cover any shenanigans that might take place during a hangout.

Ghost-Edit: To get to the hangout, type "/warehouse" in chat. This mod is about as plug-and-play as other hangout maps in that regard.

Arena

  Now this is where things get interesting. I mirrored the map and turned it into a very not-serious arena mode map (that still works with all 7 modes and now has a custom variation of the one song you know very well). Blue side has mirrored textures because I thought it was funny to leave it like that, I swear. There's some jank leftover from trying to brute-force into the arena framework, but hey what's a fun arena game-night without silly maps like this?

Nevertheless, if y'all run into any issues with this let me know and I'll try to make an updated version that fixes whatever arises. Except for the parts where you can get on the top of the level in the middle. That's another "I thought it was too entertaining not to leave it in" decision on my part, lol.

arena-hellp.10.title: Arena - HELLP!
arena-hellp.10.author: Chilly
arena-hellp.10.description:
Yes I'm aware this is currently broken in the current version. Fix coming soon.

Back with a new ma-- 
HEEEEEELP! HEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEELP MEEEEEEEEEEE! HEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEELP!

Okay but seriously; this is a JOKE map taking place entirely within an enclosed area where your only items are bombs. Prepare to hear dozens of explosions go off while the soothing tune of Piranha Plant's Lullaby plays.

Please don't play this map too seriously, it's actually terrible. But maybe in a fun way. 
i don't regret making it though :trol:

arena-twin-castle-siege.404.title: Arena - Twin Castle Siege
arena-twin-castle-siege.404.author: BuckleyTim
arena-twin-castle-siege.404.description:
So this is an experimental-ish Arena map. It's primarily centered around CTF gameplay (though you can play other modes on it- maybe not king of the hill though as of this writing). It also has large bodies of water as it's major gimmick. Maybe you might want to enable faster swimming with this? I wouldn't know the first thing about balancing for water as a gimmick.

...Which is why I'm uploading this map in an unfinished state (omitting stuff like custom music and a skybox) as I hope to garner a bit of player feedback for this map. Let me know what you guys think of it so I can fine-tune it.

Have a fun time fragging!

----

Known bugs so far:

- One of the springs causes script errors despite working perfectly fine. I am unsure why.

-Animations for the arena weapons bugs out hard while in a swimming state. Nothing unplayable though visually it doesn't work right.

-KOTH hill doesn't spawn sometimes

backup-star-warp.32.title: Backup Star Warp
backup-star-warp.32.author: wereyoshi
backup-star-warp.32.description:
when collecting a star or key spawn a star copy that other players can use to follow you. Made for scenarios where you need to collect a star to go to a certain place which would otherwise require you to take turns collecting the star or synchronize your star collection with other players. if everyone wanted to go there.

This mod has an api _G.backupstarwarp which contains

getversion - this function returns the back up star warp version

get_backupstarwarpbehaviorid - this function returns the behavior id of the fake star

addactioncheck - this function is for adding actions that you want backup star warps to have ignore backup stars

addtostaridcheck - this function is for if you want backup star warps to only work for certain stars

My second ever moveset has arrived! This baller moveset takes inspiration from the Mario Party minigame Bumper Balls, as well as everyone's favorite(?) Super Mario Galaxy feature. I took the time to really make it

100% has been proven possible, even in single player. However, it's probably going to be frustrating playing this alone. You have been warned.

base-character-stats.254.title: Base Character Stats!
base-character-stats.254.author: zcrudehydro
base-character-stats.254.description:
This mod edits the base 4 playable characters in the game to have their very own stats and abilities! They are as follows:

Mario: Bonks are simply less strong to him.

Luigi: Higher jump, lower running speed. His third jump is a twirl.

Toad: Lower jump, higher running speed.

Waluigi: Takes less damage, lower jump.

Wario: Dies in a singular hit, hold the punch button in the air to hover for a limited time.

This also adds some quality-of-life improvements:

Hold the punch button while twirling to descend much faster.

Landing from a twirl no longer stops you from moving for a bit.

The text on the top left will soon be removed in favor of a much more graceful method of informing the player of the mod.

bingo-coop.930.title: Bingo Coop
bingo-coop.930.author: ProfeJavix
bingo-coop.930.description:
In this mod, a 5x5 table will be generated when the match starts. Each cell will contain a different task, which can be from collecting a star in a specific level to kill a certain boss or player. When a player completes a cell, it becomes failed for the rivals.  Every player must try to make a row (horizontal,  vertical or diagonal) or, if not possible, get the highest amount of completed cells to win the match.
​

Gamemodes
​

Free For All - Every player completes his own tasks.

Teams Mode - The tasks progress is shared for the whole team.

MarioHunt (only if MH is loaded) - The match starts and ends with the MH match, and Runners complete tasks while Hunters try to get in their way.

Chat Commands​

/bingo-team [red | blue]
 select the team you wanna join.

/bingo-start
 start a Bingo match (host only)

/bingo-stop
 stops the current Bingo match if any (host only)

/bingo-mode [ffa | team]
 set the Bingo gamemode (host only)

This commands are only available if MH is NOT loaded.
​

Mod Menu Options​

Show Table Controls
 toggle on-screen Bingo table controls.

Give Buffs On Cell Completion
 toggle if certain cells give buffs. This cells will have a tiny red star on the corner (host only and if MH not loaded)

Buff Seconds [10s-90s]
 the duration in seconds of the cell buffs (host only and if MH not loaded)

Original mod idea by Drenchy. Check out his video:

bowling.1123.title: Bowling
bowling.1123.author: djoslin0
bowling.1123.description:
Bowl with up to 16 people (
4-6 recommended
) for a fun social hangout or turn it into a competitive event. Finish the match with over 100 points for a chance to permanently unlock a new bowling ball skin, or score a strike for an immediate chance to unlock a skin! This mod is both a tech demo of coops capabilities and is also tons of fun! 

Features:

Traditional bowling rules, 2 rolls per frame, 10 frames per game, potential extra bowl in frame 10.

Celebration system for players that score consecutive Strikes.

24 total bowling balls that can be unlocked by chance after a Strike.

Fully translated localization for Spanish and Portuguese languages.

For modders interested, here are technical features used in this mod:

Realtime physics engine through Lua

New lighting engine capabilities

New BmFont library with functions to animate custom fonts

Other neat demonstrations like scrolling textures, custom camera movements, DoF, etc..

Created by 
djoslin0
 and 
The Incredible Holc

bowser-gauntlet.825.author: EmilyEmmi
bowser-gauntlet.825.description:
Bowser In The Sky is replaced with the Bowser Gauntlet, where you must play all three Bowser stages in a row and then fight the final Bowser. If you've played BAZR, it's pretty similar to that.

You're given both keys by default, and BitDW and BitFS are inaccessible from their normal areas. You can also disable Gauntlet Checkpoints for a tougher experience- if you die at any point in the Gauntlet, you have to try again from the beginning!

Not compatible with rom hacks, but it IS compatible with MarioHunt, as far as I know.

bowsers-koopalings-character-pack.890.title: Bowser's Koopalings Character Pack
bowsers-koopalings-character-pack.890.author: BassiKun
bowsers-koopalings-character-pack.890.description:
With this character pack I bring you the ability to play as a set of characters from Bowser's Koopalings, a Koopalings fan-series on YouTube created by FreezeFlame22! The characters are also all voiced by their voice actors from the show! (Except for one, who instead uses voice clips from the episodes)

To install it, simply place the "[CS] Bowser's Koopalings Character Pack" file into your "mods" folder. The Characters all use the Bowser Moveset mod, so make sure to have that installed, as well as the latest version of Character Select.

Special thanks to:

wibblus and melzinoff for giving me access and permission to use the Koopalings and Bowser Jr. character bases to make these characters. I really couldn't have done this without them!

All the voice actors who helped me make this mod a reality. You all rock!

My friends over at Discord for encouraging me to learn Blender to make this dream come true. If you guys are reading this, thank you from the bottom of my heart!

Cowabunga and FreezeFlame22 himself over on Discord for the sprites used both in the image below and in the character icons found in the mod itself.

The people at the Coop Central server for helping me whenever I had doubts with Blender. Thanks to them, I have improved a bit with the program!

This mod includes the following characters:

Travis Koopa (VA: GengarOfTheOpera):

A chill guy with a very laid-back attitude, Travis comes into Super Mario 64 to both save the day while taking it all easy.

Lauren Knightley (VA: GlitterGhostz)

A nice and friendly, if a bit sarcastic girl. She's an avid gamer and is not afraid of demonstrating her skills!

Ally Rook (VA: Carmen)

Ally is a very sweet girl who, in spite of her ditziness, does everything in her power to support the ones she loves.

Camilla McQueen (VA: Carmen)

A vain and selfish girl from the McQueen family. When Camilla wants something, she will do anything in her power to get it.

Ember Ford (VA: YuriHaru567) 

A girl who is as brash and condescending as she is hot-headed. Ember looks down on everyone else and never passes up an opportunity if it means ridiculing others.

Jade Garnet (VA: GlitterGhostz)

A very mischevious and self-centered girl, Jade finds a lot of amusement in the misfortunes of other people.

Eddie Knightley (Voice Clips: Swoldow)

Lauren's older brother. He is short-tempred and rather brash, but he is genuinely a good guy underneath that tough exterior.

Known Issues:

When going into Shell Mode, the shadow size doesn't match the shell. This is something I will try to fix in the future as I eventually figure out how to adjust shadow sizes.

Hair often clips through the female characters' shells. This is something I was struggling with due to how little experience in Blender I had. I ultimately decided to leave it as it is, but I may try to fix it in the future.

boyo.96.title: Boyo!
boyo.96.author: Ex Coop Mods Archive
boyo.96.description:
Original Post: February 12, 2023

Author: Karam

Boyo For SM64!

The goofball, pops into the world of [[S u p e r M a r i o]] to strut off his skills!

(Type /boyo on | drips | gat to activate one of the three current versions of Boyo)

Basic Moveset :

Leap! – The replacement for the ‘Long-Jump’, allows you to jump over great distances. Pressing B while performing will cause you to go into a rollout state, slowing down your momentum. (Pressing B while starting will give you a burst of speed!)

Wall Hop! – Bonk, Leap, or Dive onto a wall to scale it! (Diving can be used consecutively.)

Character Swaps – Each version plays similarly to Base-Boyo, just with a few new tricks (more or less), some may be better for specific situations.

Extras :

– Ground-Pounding allows you to transition into Diving and Slide-Kicking depending on if you’re on ground or mid-air

– Slide-Kicking can be done consecutively

– Extra Eye-Poses and Interactions depending on current state

— “10/10 IGN Best Mod” — Best Gamer (Max)

— “Wao-h!” — The Epic

— “thats actually cool” — Crowned Maniac (Intentional Typo)

Thanks to all the little Goobers that helped me find solutions to weird little ‘marmo’ oddities!

breaking-bad-death-cutscene.197.author: AgentX
breaking-bad-death-cutscene.197.description:
Breaking Bad Death Cutscene

This mod replaces the normal death sequence with the final shot of Breaking Bad where the camera pans away from Walter White's body. Bubbling is automatically disabled and the sequence is only triggered by dying standing, on your back, on your stomach, suffocating, being electrocuted or drowning.

When a player dies, the music will play and get louder the closer you are to the body and quieter the farther away. The vanilla music also fades out the closer you are to the body.

Press 
[A]
 or 
[B]
 to skip the cutscene.

brutal-bosses.219.author: EmilyEmmi
brutal-bosses.219.description:
This mod makes bosses more difficult. It adds new attacks and adjustments to every boss in the game. Also includes changes to NPCs, such as Toad, Mips, Bob-Omb Buddy, and more. Expect other secrets too...

While this is compatible with rom hacks, you'll have to play in vanilla to experience all of the secret content. Also comes with a /reshuffle command for rom hacks, in case Toad or Tuxie become unreachable.

EDIT: Since people keep reporting this bug, I'm going to say it here: The Bob-Omb Buddy dialog being broken is a CHARACTER SELECT ISSUE. This mod is much older than the latest versions of Character Select, and newer features with Character Select have caused known compatibility issues for a long time. You'll have to either live without Character Select with this mod or deal with the dialog issues for now.

character-movesets.191.title: Character Movesets
character-movesets.191.author: steven3004
character-movesets.191.description:
One of the older mods of sm64ex-coop is back with a slight bit of overhaul, giving each character fairly unique ways to play.

This mod can be toggled by typing 
/char-mov
, in case you prefer your typical vanilla experience. (The moveset is on by default.)

Moves list:

Mario:

Handstand Jump
 (Crawling + A):
 Taken some inspiration from DK94 and Mario VS DK, this is basically a triple jump that goes higher, but has less speed. It's ideal for reaching higher spaces that can't be reached with a backflip or a side flip when there is no space to build up a triple jump, or just a fun lil' alternative to any of the aforementioned jumps.

Luigi:

Passive Stats: 
Luigi can jump higher and swim faster, but his shoes are rather slippery, therefore affecting his ground traction and speed, and wall kick height.

He also has slightly weaker health.

Scuttle Jump: 
By holding A while falling down during some jumps, Luigi will kick his feet to fall slower.

Spindrift Backflip: 
Taken straight from SM64DS, Luigi will do a spinning jump after he falls from a backflip.

Spin Pound 
(Holding Z)
:
 Basically a ground pound, but without the 2 second stop in mid-air and you have more control over it.

Toad:

Passive Stats:
 Toad is the fastest character out of the cast. His ground pound goes faster and running can maintain more speed, but his jump height is the worst. His wall kick, however, can be stronger with speed.

Ground Pound Jump: 
Pressing A while landing with a ground pound basically lets Toad do a higher triple jump.

Waluigi: 

Passive Stats:
 Waluigi moves slightly faster, and jumps slightly lower, while his triple jump is significantly buffed.

But due to being built like a stick bug, he loses way more health than any other character.

Wall Slide:
 Instead of light-bonking onto a wall, Waluigi will slide against it, and triples jumps out of one when A is pressed.

Elegant Jump:
 A take one Waluigi's double jump, where upon pressing A during some jumps, Waluigi will twirl in the air with all is Walugrace and be able to instantly switch directions.

Air Swim 
(Dive + B)
:
 Waluigi can defy gravity and swim three times before he falls to a place that's hopefully not his impending doom.

Wario:

Passive Stats:
 Wario is a much heavier and stronger guy, so he jumps lower and moves slower.

He falls faster with a ground pound and sinks when he's underwater.

He can effortlessly lift heavy objects and loses little to virtually no damage, except when he touches lava.

Shoulder Bash 
(Ground Dive)
: 
With this ability, Wario can ram into enemies and objects and send 'em flying.

Corkscrew Conk
 (Bash + A)
: 
A jump that's roughly the height of a double jump Wario can do while shoulder-bashing. He can also do it mid-air, making it a decent recovery move.

Wild Swing-Ding:
 By rotating the stick quickly while running with and object, Wario can spin it like spining Bowser. Note that for now, this is more of a neat visual thing rather than affecting how far you can throw the object.

Piledriver:
 Pressing Z while jumping with an object in hand and Wario will go pummeling down with it.

Hope you all enjoy the mod!

character-select-nuzlocke.792.title: Character Select Nuzlocke
character-select-nuzlocke.792.author: wereyoshi
character-select-nuzlocke.792.description:
This mod is a character select nuzlocke mod. when you die the character you are using is eliminated. So if you die as mario then no one can use mario.

It also features an api _G.charselectnuzlockeapi -which has options like addteamcheck which adds a team check for gamemodes.

get_deadcharactertable for getting eliminated characters. reset_nuzlocketable for resetting the nuzlocke table for everyone

Spoiler: 
_G.charselectnuzlockeapi 

--function for other mods to add a team check for gamemodes 

    addteamcheck ,

--function that lets other mods get a table of only the current dead characters

    get_deadcharactertable,

 ---this function lets other mods see if a player has no characters

    get_hascharacterstatus,

--function that lets other mods get a table of only the current living characters

    get_livingcharactertable,

--- function to allow other mods to get the current resetnuzlocksavefunction function

    get_resetnuzlocksavefunction,

--resets the nuzlocke table for everyone

    reset_nuzlocketable,

--function to for other mods to set if this mod will reset the save with nuzlocke table reset

    reset_save_on_reset,

--- function to allow other mods to run code when the local player's nuzlocke table is reset

    on_nuzlockereset,

--- function to allow other mods to run code whenever the local player's nuzlocke table changes

    on_nuzlocketableupdate,

--function used by the host to revive a character for a player

    server_revive_character_for_player,

--this function resets the nuzlocke table of a single player

    reset_nuzlocketableofspecificplayer,

---this function allows other mods to set the current nuzlocke character

    set_nuzlockecharacter,

--- function to allow other mods to replace the function character select nuzlocke uses to reset the current save. 

    set_resetnuzlocksavefunction,

--- function to allow other mods to run code when the local player runs out of characters

    on_nocharactersleftfunction,

--this function returns the current version of the mod

    get_version,

character-select-randomizer.775.title: Character Select Randomizer
character-select-randomizer.775.author: wereyoshi
character-select-randomizer.775.description:
This is a character select randomizer mod that randomizes your character on hit, coin collection ,or level change. Each of said randomization methods can be toggled off.

using Character Select v1.15.1 and up will allow the mod to randomize costumes.

It also features an api _G.charselectrandomizerapi -which has options like 

othermodhandlecharacter - for having another mod handle characters

customcharacterrerollfunction - for other mods providing their own character reroll function

forcereroll - for another mod to force a reroll

get_version - for getting the current version of the mod.

character-select.149.title: Character Select
character-select.149.author: Squishy6094
character-select.149.description:
A Model Selector for SM64CoopDX with an Extensive API and tons of Support!
​

Our main goal is to make Character Creation on Lua's end as simple as possible, and to move away from the old Skin Pack mod people keep copying and pasting. With this goal in mind, we tried to make everything as streamlined as possible throughout the character addition process, while allowing for tons of customizability!

If you encounter any errors please report them on Github so they can be solved as soon as possible:

Bug Report Submission

Changelog, Resources, and More Info can be found on the Github (Linked in Additional Information)
​

Support Development on 
Ko-Fi
!

classic-doom-weapons.848.title: Classic Doom Weapons
classic-doom-weapons.848.author: Pseudonym929
classic-doom-weapons.848.description:
12 Weapons from Doom, Doom II, and Doom 64

Includes randomized weapon and ammo spawns, custom hitboxes for handing attacks, HUD for ammo and powerups, and improved first person camera

X and Y to switch between weapons
​
Weapons:

Fist

incl. Berserk powerup

Chainsaw

Pistol

Shotgun

Super Shotgun

Chaingun

Rocket Launcher

Plasma Gun

BFG9000

Unmaker

incl. Demon Key upgrades

must be enabled via chat command

Incinerator

must be enabled via chat command

Calamity Blade

must be enabled via chat command

Items:

Pickups of all weapons

excl. fist and pistol, which are available at start

Clip (+10 bullets)

Shotgun Shells (+4 shells)

Rocket (+1 rocket)

Plasma Cell (+20 plasma)

Fuel Can (+10 fuel)

Berserk

provides full heal

remains active until player exits area (red haze is just a visual effect)

Backpack (+10 bullets, +4 shells, + 1 rocket, +20 plasma, +10 fuel)

doubles ammo capacity (1 time only)

+1 Secret item per area

Commands:

/unmaker (true/false): Toggles Unmaker and Demon Key spawns (server owner only)

/lor (on/off/mix): Toggles Incinerator, Calamity Blade, and fuel spawns. "on" causes them to replace the plasma weapons (plasma cells will remain if Unmaker is enabled), "mix" enables spawning of all weapons and ammo types (server owner only)

/vertspread (true/false): Toggles vertical spread for the shotgun and chaingun (server owner only)

/msglimit (0 - 99): Maximum number of pickup messages 

/msgtime (0-600): # of Seconds a pickup message will remain on screen

/altitemnames (true/false): changes the names of certain items to be more technically accurate (in case that kind of thing bothers you)

/maxitems (any nonnegative integer): changes the maximum number of items that can appear in an area, useful if you're playing a romhack with big levels (server owner only)

/spawns base (
any nonnegative integer
): changes the number of weapons that spawn in an area at 0 stars (server owner only)

/spawns starbonus (any positive integer): changes how many stars the player(s) need to have for an extra weapon spawn, to disable, set to an unreachably high number (server owner only)

/spawns secret 
(any nonnegative integer): changes the number of secrets that spawns in an area 
(server owner only)

/intermission (doom, doom2, doom64, off): changes or disables the intermission screen

/pistolstart (true/false): Toggles Pistol Start. Players will start every level with just a pistol and fists (server owner only)

+4 cheats from the original games (server owner only)

Note: This has not been extensively tested in multiplayer. Bugs are likely to occur.

classic-style-playerlist.441.title: Classic Style Playerlist
classic-style-playerlist.441.author: king the memer
classic-style-playerlist.441.description:
Coop's gui is very simple and uniform which works well on its

own, but seems out of place alongside the original game's distinct,

colorful artstyle, at least in my opinion, so i decided to experiment

with what gui i could edit ingame and see how close i could get it

to the original artstyle. the easiest thing to edit i could find was the

playerlist, which i completely overhauled using the file select menu

as a basis

a full lobby of players was too much to fit on one page so i added

a feature that lets you scroll to page 2 with your scroll wheel

alongside the new playerlist is a remodelled logo based on the

vanilla one plus some hud improvements, both are found in the

dynos folder

climb-attack.119.title: Climb Attack!
climb-attack.119.author: eeliottheking
climb-attack.119.description:
In Climb Attack, players race to climb as high as possible on a randomly generated tower by strategically placing blocks. The goal is to outclimb your opponents and reach the highest point before the time runs out. The player who climbs the highest wins the round!

This mod introduces a block-building mechanic inspired by Minecraft, allowing players to construct their way up the tower using a limited number of blocks. Players must carefully manage their block resources and plan their ascent while avoiding obstacles and competing against other climbers.

Key Features:

- Random tower generation: Each round, a new tower is procedurally generated, ensuring a fresh and challenging experience every time.

- Block building: Use the Y button to place blocks and create your path upwards. Punching or kicking blocks will refund your block count.

WARNING
: This mode has a 
LOT 
of objects!  
Do not play with 16 players!
  Do not play with 10 players with max settings for the tower!  You will get 
lag
!  If you experience desynch due to lag, issue
 /round restart 
to try and resolve the issue!

Chat Commands (for server host):

- /round restart: Force the current round to restart and initiate a new cleanup round.

- /set-num-boxes (number): Set the number of boxes to spawn for the tower (default: 100).

- /set-match-duration (number): Set the duration of each match in seconds (default: 90).

- /set-box-vertical-range (number): Set the vertical spawn range for boxes in box units (default: 50).

- /set-box-horizontal-range (number): Set the horizontal spawn range for boxes in box units (default: 5).

- /set-player-boxes (number): Set the maximum number of blocks each player can place (default: 10).

Credits:

Creator: eeliottheking

Music by Eric Matyas - 
www.soundimage.org

Map (Roblox Baseplate) by beardenthusiast

Minecraft mod by zKevin

Special thanks to all the publicly available mods on the GitHub repository for providing valuable information and resources!

Todo List:

-Improve Lag

-Find a better way to detect breaking blocks

-Remove color tags from names

-Find a better way to clear the map

cmdlib-command-library.604.title: CMDLib (Command Library)
cmdlib-command-library.604.author: kloodi
cmdlib-command-library.604.description:
CMDLib is a command library that helps other mods make commands easier.

There are lots of features including:

Adding Commands

Editing Commands (Not just the description)

Removing Commands

Automatic Argument Parsing

Error Handling

CMDLib commands are prefixed with "!" rather than "/" (For no interfering with sm64coopdx commands)

There are two commands by default that you cannot edit or remove.

!help and !helpcmd, Which give a list of commands and a long description of a specific command respectively.

coin-requirement-modifier.244.title: Coin Requirement Modifier
coin-requirement-modifier.244.author: Dragonary
coin-requirement-modifier.244.description:
Coin Requirement Modifier

Created by Dragonary

Ever find yourself struggling to find the last red coin, or just too lazy to grab all 100 coins?

This mod allows you to easily change the number of coins needed for the 100 coin and red coin stars with these 3 simple commands:

/coin [number]
 - Change 100 coin star requirement

/redcoin [number]
 - Change red coin star requirement

/resetcoins
 - Reset both coin star requirements

Only the host can run these commands, so you don't need to worry about people messing around with them in a public server.

cs-carl-wheezer-64.507.title: [CS] Carl Wheezer 64
cs-carl-wheezer-64.507.author: CornObjects
cs-carl-wheezer-64.507.description:
Carl Wheezer
, the biggest fan of Jimmy Neutron's mom in the entire universe and gobbler of unfinished croissants the world over, now infesting your copy of Mario 64 with friends and making terrible noises just like in the show. Nobody else seems to have done it yet, and I've always been a fan of bringing horrible things to life via blender, so here you go.

Comes with:

Custom voicelines of highly-variable compression and quality from 5 different Jimmy Neutron shovelware games

Palette support on his skin and hair under appropriate palette categories, facial decal is not amazing but I did my best

Llama life count icon for proper theming, Carl does love his llamas after all

Hat model is himself, to represent finally acquiring his long absent self-confidence and using it to rise above the challenges before him (and 
definitely not
 because I still have yet to find a fix for that, promise)

Carefully-named internal files to minimize the risk that you'll miss out on hearing Carl's beautiful voice because another CS mod shares filenames in its voice system

No script errors that I could find anywhere, after way too much trial-and-error figuring out why it was calling in the lua file for a custom health HUD that this mod doesn't have

Credits:

Garrulous64
 - 
This excellent tutorial video
 I used to make this from scratch by following it, along with the "Fast64 GART" plugin for blender and multiple different template resources linked in the video description. If you want to make your own CS mod, I strongly recommend taking a look at it and the linked resources, they help immensely.

TheVGResource
, specifically Models Resource and Sounds Resource - Model + Sounds

daneeklu
 on OpenGameArt - Pixel art llama sprite used for the lives icon

Emerald
 and 
Squishy
, on the coop mod discussion channel of the discord server - Tons of help with understanding and fixing bugs with the mod while I worked on it

My pal 
Steveski
 - Testing, troubleshooting and moral support

Conker and Banjo join Mario 64 Co-op deluxe!
​

In an exciting twist for retro gaming fans, Banjo and Conker are teaming up with Mario in the classic Super Mario 64 Co-op mod! This fan-made mod brings together three beloved gaming icons for an unforgettable multiplayer experience. Imagine exploring the iconic worlds of Peach's Castle with Banjo's strength and Conker's cheeky humor alongside Mario's timeless agility. Whether you're soaring through the skies or stomping Goombas, this crossover adds a fresh layer of fun to the game, blending platforming magic with nostalgic charm!

cs-cream-the-rabbit.282.title: [CS] Cream the Rabbit
cs-cream-the-rabbit.282.author: Gamebun
cs-cream-the-rabbit.282.description:
Note: If voicelines are not playing, you must be on 
Character Select v1.16.1
 or above!

Cream's birthday is all over but she still wants to have fun! Escaped from her own mod, she explores the vast worlds of CoopDX! I know there's been a few ports by others of this model (and I appreciate it) though I figure I get an official version from me, with some extra bits.

Comes with a customizable palette, new animations replacing the idle, sleep and running anims, custom sounds, health hud, life and star icon and new star model. As of v2.0, she now regains the ability to fly as well as bringing along several of her outfits from Cream 64! As of v3.0, Vanilla has joined the pack as a replacement for Peach! This also includes replacing the two Toads at the end with their chao, Cheese & Chocola!

Simply press (A) to fly out of any of the jumps, the side flips and wall kicks. You need to press (B) to fly out of a long jump and then press (A) to keep flying. This is built to allow players to still be able to do the BLJ if needed.

A companion mod, 
Cheese the Chao
, is also available!

Cream's outfits are also separated into four packs to not overwhelm players when there's suddenly 80+ outfits on her single slot. Simply place the main folder 
(char-select-cream)
 alongside any of the other pack folders in the 
mods
 folder to install the mod correctly.

If you simply just wanna play as Cream, you only need to worry about the main pack and can ignore the rest. The packs are:

Main: The Rabbit Herself

Contains her default design, remade to allow custom palettes!

Pack 1: Canon Outfits + a Few Extras

Spoiler: 
Pack 1

Riders (Sonic Riders)

Winter (Sonic Channel)

Spring (Sonic Forces Speed Battle)

Unicorn (Sonic Forces Speed Battle)

Yukata (Mario & Sonic 2020 Tokyo Olympics)

Swimsuit (Sonic X)

Halloween (Sonic Channel)

Junihotoe (Sonic Channel)

Princess (Sonic IDW Issue 22 RI Cover)

Detective (Sonic Channel)

cs-deltarune-ch4-secret-boss-moveset.758.title: [CS] Deltarune Ch4 Secret boss (+ Moveset!)
cs-deltarune-ch4-secret-boss-moveset.758.author: SwagSkeleton95
cs-deltarune-ch4-secret-boss-moveset.758.description:
Your browser is not able to display this video.

The secret boss from chapter 4 busts his way into Mario 64!

Originally just a model swap mod, coding help from Baconator2558 (
Youtube
) and 
@Kaktus64
 (
Bluesky
) with voice acting from Starwarrior64 (
Twitter
, 
Youtube
) it's become something a bit more than t
hat
.

THIS MOD FEATURES:

Full recolorability

Custom UI graphics

Bowser moveset compatibility (Shell slide)

Voice acting (Toggle between voice acted lines and game sounds!)

A brand new moveset integrating the TP bar mechanic from the original game

A tough-as-nails challenge mode that forces you to use your moveset against Bowser in a deadly game of tennis

Optional alternate skyboxes for the bowser levels

A small example mod to show how you can use the moveset's TP bar or rude buster in your own mod (Lancer approved!)

Be sure to check the mod menu to toggle most of these options!

MOVESET

While Gerson uses the standard moveset, using the Hammer Of Justice costume will give you access to a special moveset consisting of 4 new moves.

Hammer Spin: 
Press Z + A mid-air to bounce yourself into a powerful hammer spin! Great for movement, good for crushing enemies. Costs 6 TP to use.

Shell Groundpound: 
Performing a ground pound with enough TP will send two koopa shells from your sides! Good for taking out small groups of enemies. Costs 1 TP to use.

Dive Roll:
 Holding Z after a dive lets Gerson roll to keep his momentum and extend the slide.

Justice Buster: 
Press Z + B to unleash your most powerful attack: the mighty Justice Buster! This attack costs 33 TP to use, but is very powerful against most enemies. The projectile will home in on any nearby targets and swiftly strike them down. This move is necessary against Bowser in the challenge mode!

REQUIRES WIBBLUS' BOWSER MOVESET
 -
 Shell slide: 
Shell slide from the Bowser Moveset. Replaces the slide kick.

TP BAR

The moveset's main feature is the new TP bar, which is used to perform Gerson's special moves. TP is spent by using moveset moves, but can be regained by collecting coins, defeating enemies, collecting stars, swinging Bowser by the tail or entering new levels. Or, if you would prefer, the mod provides a (host-exclusive) option to regenerate TP automatically at a quick rate, allowing you to use your moves as much as you please.

LANCER

Huh- Lancer?

The mod comes with a small example mod featuring Lancer. Open it up to get an example of how to use this mod's TP bar and rude buster for your own characters! This will require the Gerson Boom mod as a dependency.

cs-doorway-divers-favchars.745.title: [CS] Doorway Divers (FavChars)
cs-doorway-divers-favchars.745.author: Fav
cs-doorway-divers-favchars.745.description:
Dummie, Frank, Huggert, and Panella have come to invade Super Mario 64!​
Who said modding in your OCs wasn't fun?
​

Dummie has two extra jumps he can use at (almost) any time! From your base jump, to side flips, to even long jumps! He even has a faster running speed!​

(Fun note: Wall kicks replenish your extra jumps!)

As a bonus, if you happen to have your wing cap on or activated the special triple jump, the last jump will change! Pull off some sick tricks with this!

As Frank, you can fly around by double jumping for a short amount of time before he gets tired. If you hold jump again while flying, Frank will burst upward, and hover back down until you let go of the button. Use the second jump to thrust yourself based on your directional input!​

Huggert's a lot slower than the rest, but makes up for it with his lower gravity. If you hold jump again after your first jump, Huggert will use the power of the stars to float upward, and slowly descend back down. Great for long falls downward!​

Panella's a lot stronger than the rest, capable of carrying objects easier, no matter the weight. If you ground pound and press A or B at the right time, Panella will either perform a Super Jump, or a Super Kick. Your directional input will influence where she'll go!​
​
I hope you enjoy this mod as much as I did making it!​

​
Credits:

Garrulous64
 
- 
Mario 64 Modding Tutorial Video

CoopDX team - Referenced code from the built-in 
Extra Characters mod
 to better understand how movesets are structured

Dummie 
- For being a good boy

​

Fazbear 64​
Welcome to 
Freddy Fazbear's Pizza
 the Mushroom Kingdom, where fantasy and fun come to life!​

In a special crossover, Freddy Fazbear and his band have been invited to the Mushroom Kingdom to throw a big pizza party! (Oh, and William Afton is there) Unfortunately that dastardly King Koopa, angry that he wasn't invited, has taken all 120 pizza slices and scattered them throughout the painting worlds.

Now it's up to Freddy & friends to recover them all before they get cold, and show that big turtle what for!
​
FEATURES:

-7 new playable characters!​
-Freddy Fazbear (Comes with golden Freddy alt!)​
-Bonnie the Bunny (Comes with movie palette alt!
)
​
-Chica the Chicken (Comes with...No alts.)​
-Foxy the Pirate (Comes with unwithered alt!)​
-Endoskeleton​
-The puppet​
-Springtrap (Comes with Spring Bonnie alt!)​
-Custom graphics!​
-A custom, Fazbear-themed health meter​
-Custom star models in the form of pizza slices, dead stars and gift boxes (May be overriden by other mods)​
-A custom lives icon based on the unused lives mechanic from FNAF 1​
​

MORE TO COME:

In the future, I'm hoping to add:

-A custom story that replaces the dialogue in the game if you're playing as the band (Toggleable)​
-Edited stats for Foxy (And maybe the rest of the band? Toggleable)​
BUGS I'M AWARE OF:

-None!​

THE LATEST VERSION OF SQUISHY'S CHARACTER SELECT IS NEEDED TO USE THIS MOD!
​

cs-gabys-modding-frenzy.1109.title: [CS] Gaby's Modding Frenzy
cs-gabys-modding-frenzy.1109.author: Gabrimer
cs-gabys-modding-frenzy.1109.description:
Welcome aboard, to my Modding Frenzy!
​

This mod project involves the idea I had at the beginning of the year, which was to make a year-long inspired project, adding multiple different sets of characters into SM64COOPDX! The character selection that I'm making is mostly either OCs I've made, or other characters from my friend's games/projects.

That being said, I understand this modpack might not interest most people, but I figured I'd share my work here, as I am happy with what I've made! (and it'd be nice seeing other people play with these characters)

I'm releasing each modpack on a monthly basis, with each pack having a certain theme to it, either being characters from a certain game, or characters from a similar origin/story. I'll be posting whenever I release a month's pack on my socials, then updating this mod page to include that pack!

It's worth noting that some packs won't be included in this mod page, for reasons such as an OC's author not wanting public access to these character mods, or anything related to the sort.

With that out of the way, let me introduce you to our character selection!

---------- ---------- ---------- ---------- ----------

February - Aria Skies Character Pack​

This month's pack is none other than the fighters from 
Aria Skies
! As a way to celebrate the game's first anniversary, I decided to dedicate this month to the character pack.

Includes:​

7 new characters (with custom Character Select graffiti and music track)

Red

Erika

Feng

Starre

Khaed

Wolske

Bilksem

Unique costumes for each character based on their different color palettes from the original game!

March - Jam Character Pack​

For March, we have a selection of characters that originated from game jams! This volume includes characters from 
H.A.R. VEST
, 
Moon Munchies
, and 
Date Summons
.

Includes:​

5 new characters (with custom Character Select graffiti and music track)

Jason

Mipp

Lola

May

Manat

---------- ---------- ---------- ---------- ----------

So far, this project includes February and March's modpack (January was a private release between my friends and me), but as I mentioned previously, I'll be periodically adding new characters each month, so be on the lookout for that!

Link to Gaby's SM64COOP Modding Frenzy Playlist!

Credits:​
Gabrimer: Mod Creator, Character Modeller, CS Music Track Composer, Coder

Pokopish: Aria Skies Creator, Original Hat Modeller & Graffiti/Life Icon Artist

Squishy6094: Character Select Creator

Remember that this mod 
requires
 
Character Select
 for it to work!​

---------- ---------- ---------- ---------- ----------

cs-grey-man.546.title: [CS] Grey Man
cs-grey-man.546.author: CornObjects
cs-grey-man.546.description:
In the year 1998, a strange and unique little game named LSD: Dream Emulator came out on the PS1 only in Japan, based on a dream journal and the bizarre experiences chronicled within. Despite how locally-restricted its release was and how niche its focus, as well as frankly being clunky as all hell mechanically, it still ended up becoming a cult classic of sorts, including one particular rare entity found within gaining notoriety of its own; 

The Grey Man, one of the few truly-dangerous things you could come across on your dream journeys. One which ignored all obstacles to make its way forward slowly and menacingly, ending your dream instantly if you make contact. A total enigma, beyond the fact that it was as strange as it was scary.

Anyways, that's enough gaming history and mysteries, now you get to watch this spooky entity do sick jumps and fly around with wings on his hat while making funny noises. Plus, he's finally in a game with decent FPS and controls by default.

Features:

Complete custom palette recolorability, including a bonus when hat is removed

Full custom hat model set (including hat removal for vulture/monkey/OMM/etc.)

Custom lives icon, as is tradition

An entire set of sounds cut from SFX and audio snippets used in LSD itself, mainly the base audio clips that the strange randomized music in-game is built out of, so GM's "voice" is basically the music of the game in a sense

Integration with the "Character Movesets" mod, GM uses the Waluigi moveset and can double-jump, swim in the air by diving mid-air multiple times and takes extra damage from hits (can be changed easily with one simple edit in the main.lua file, the zip includes a readme with info on how)

Maybe some slight jank here and there (did my best to avoid it though)​

Credits:

TheVGResource
 - Models, Textures and Audio

"LSD Dreamy Texture Pack" by 
BTL Games
 on itch.io - The image used for the lives icon, specifically "8.png" from the "faces" folder, downscaled to 64x from 1024x original

I'mYourCat
 on the CoopDX discord server - Helping me fix yet another annoying metal material bug that was preventing export in blender, by taking a look at my blend file and telling me what workaround I needed to do to fix it

Release Trailer:

Alternate Download Link: 
CLICK HERE

You need the latest version of Character Select for the mod to work, Click This Text to go to the Download page.

I've been working on this project for a little while, and it's finally ready...

You can now play as Geo and the rest of the Gwain Saga cast in SM64 Coop Deluxe!

Gwain Warriors 64 is a Character Select mod that brings 9 characters from the Gwain Saga series to the game. With a few extra additions such as:

-Alternate costumes for each character!

-Various Texture Replacements Fitting to the Show

-A Noobe WiddlePet!

Download Noobe Here: 
MOD LINK

-And a few other additions! (that's about it)

CREDITS:

B. Bones Johnson
 - Mod Idea, Modelling

Phantalón Gilimbecil
 
- Owner of GSFD, Release Trailer

Sonac
 
-
 
Promotional Art, Icon Textures

Vyndelaa
 
- 
Character Face Textures

Dankira 
- 
Remix Outfit Designs

SleepyAnger
 
- Character Descriptions
​
Gwain Saga is a webseries created by GeoExe, this mod couldn't have happened without it. So make sure you check it out in the link below!

Link to Geo's YouTube Channel

And that's all I have to say for now, here's a few extra images that were taken while making this mod.

Have fun!

cs-kakkoi-elbertson.770.title: [CS] Kakkoi Elbertson
cs-kakkoi-elbertson.770.author: The Memelord
cs-kakkoi-elbertson.770.description:
HEY, PAISANOS!
 

Ever wanted to play as that one mafia gal from 
Gensokyo Odyssey
 in Super Mario 64?

No?

Then I guess this isn't the mod for you then... BUT, if you are, then look no further than the 
Kakkoi Elbertson mod!

(You will need the character select mod in order for this work, chucklenuts! It's also worth mentioning that this mod includes voicelines with curse words, so if you can't handle curse words lightly or you don't want your parents to listen on your gaming session with Kakkoi, then this mod isn't for you after all.)

The mod includes:

-Custom model of Kakkoi Elbertson from the hit game Gensokyo Odyssey (duh)

-Custom voicelines and sounds provided by Kronington, Abder Fumo, and VA RagingAngel (As per her request, RagingAngel asked me to put a link to her X [formerly Twitter] account here: 
https://x.com/RagingAngelhaha?t=TNHXgfUwmOONvwZwhlVJvw&s=09
)

-Custom models for the normal, wing, and metal cap (Sorry vanish cap lovers. Will roll out an update that includes a custom model for the vanish cap in the future.)

The full credits to the mod can be found inside the mod folder. It is a text file named "Credits.txt"

Enjoy murdering bowser's goons and 
abusing 
 playing Kakkoi Elbertson in SM64!

Also, here's a roadmap of what I plan to do with this mod in the future:

-Fixing up any broken animations or issues

-Change the color palette of Kakkoi like most other character mods do

-Polish up the model if necessary

-Add a custom health bar

-Give Kakkoi a new moveset relating to her gun and the coins you collect in the game

-Custom animations maybe?

-Release alternate skins for Kakkoi, such as an Inu variant!

If you would like to help with the development of these future updates and you have experience in doing so, let me know in the comments and I'll get back to you when I can!

Thank you and enjoy the mod!

Mods featured in the trailer:

King's Devtools 
by king the memer
 
(It's not actually shown in the trailer, but I used it to get on top of the castle. Still worth mentioning, as it's the perfect mod to test out your own mods or to mess around!)

Day Night Cycle 
by AgentX

Music used in the trailer:

Gensokyo Odyssey OST -49 Bullet You Can't Refuse 
by Kronington
​
​

cs-kirby-deluxe.1126.title: [CS] Kirby Deluxe!
cs-kirby-deluxe.1126.author: funkymonkeyjay
cs-kirby-deluxe.1126.description:
DISCLAIMER
​
This mod will only work if you have the 
Character Select
 (v1.16 onwards, preferably v1.16.3)
 mod enabled + 
the current version of SM64 Co-op DX
 (v1.4 onwards, preferably v1.4.1)
.

Character Select [Squishy6094]

Play as the pink puffball warrior in SM64 Co-op DX with a moveset directly inspired by 
Kirby and the Forgotten Land (2022)
, made to fit within Kirby's N64 era!​

This mod features:

Copy abilities in the form of the base game's power-ups, with Copy Ability Essences replacing the cap models!

Custom objects for the Air and Star bullets!

"Normal" and "Classic" costumes!

A host-only configuration that allows Kirby to puff up infinitely, perfect for ROM-hacks!

An API that allows modders to add objects for Kirby to inhale through LUA functions!

 
Enjoy my work? Follow my socials! — 
Bluesky
 | 
YouTube
 | 
Bluesky (Gamedev)
 | 
YouTube (Gamedev) 
​
CONTROLS
​

BUTTON
ACTION
[ A ] 
(MIDAIR)
Hover 
(Lasts temporarily, but can be configured by the host to last forever, suited for ROM-hacks)
[ B ]
Inhale
[ Z ] + [ B ]
Slide Kick
[ Z ] + [ CONTROL STICK ]
Dodge
[ L ]
Wave Hello

INHALE API
​
To hook a custom object for Kirby to inhale, or if you want to edit an existing object, you first need to have its behavior ID, once you've obtained it, you can proceed with adding these functions:

_G.kirbyInhaleHookBehavior
​
Allows the modder to hook a custom behavior for Kirby to inhale.

FIELD
TYPE
NOTES
id
integer (BehaviorID)
Behavior ID of the object to inhale.
canRotate
bool / function
Check to see if an object can rotate as its being inhaled, default is 
true
.
canEat
bool / function
Check to see if an object can be removed once it reaches Kirby's mouth, default is 
true
.
allowSuckFunc
bool / function
Special checks for special objects
 (I.E. Koopa the Quick)
, set 
false
 to stop the inhale, default is 
true
.
deleteOnDetect
bool
Deletes an object if it's within Kirby's inhale range, default is 
false
, set 
true
 to activate.
onEatFunc
function?
Special function that activates once the object's been deleted 
(I.E. add to Big Bully #2's condition once a bully has been eaten)
, default is 
nil
.

_G.kirbyInhaleEditBehavior
​
Allows the modder to edit an existing behavior for Kirby to inhale.

FIELD
TYPE
NOTES
id
integer (BehaviorID)
Behavior ID of the object to inhale.
canRotate
bool? / function?
Check to see if an object can rotate as its being inhaled, can be ignored.
canEat
bool? / function?
Check to see if an object can be removed once it reaches Kirby's mouth, can be ignored.
allowSuckFunc
bool? / function?
Special checks for special objects 
(I.E. Koopa the Quick)
, can be ignored.
deleteOnDetect
bool?
Deletes an object if it's within Kirby's inhale range, can be ignored.
onEatFunc
function?
Special function that activates once the object's been deleted 
(I.E. add to Big Bully #2's condition once a bully has been eaten)
, can be ignored.

SPECIAL THANKS
​

@Squishy6094
 — 
Testing, Suggestions, Additional Help

@EmilyEmmi
 — 
Help with Footstep Sounds

@Cooliokid 956
 — 
Help with Inhale Vortex Orientation

Various Testers — 
@charity
, "Honii", "Jerik", "Charlotte Lottie Lotte the III", 
@Syning
, 
@Kristall
, 
@Morishiko
, 
@Jekino
, 
@Kaktus64
, "the_silly :3", "trainyoy", 
@CristobalElMario
, "Carlson"... 
(LMK if I missed anyone else that participated in the testing sessions!)

cs-kos-mos.1056.title: [CS] Kos-Mos
cs-kos-mos.1056.author: Asplatim
cs-kos-mos.1056.description:
KOS-MOS is a character from the Xenosaga/Xenoblade series.​
She is an armored android combat weapon with an artificial intelligence. Her design is based on the KOS-MOS's Version 1 model from Xenosaga Episode I: Der Wille zur Macht; both the original and redesign are by Kunihiko Tanaka.
​
Kos-mos is from the very first game Monolith Soft ever developed back in 2002 called Xenosaga. This is the game that established the entire Xeno series for the company and is what made Kos-mos the face of the series and the mascot of Monolith Soft.
​
The purpose of this mod is to help spread awareness of both Xenosaga and Xenoblade by introducing people to Kos-mos and hopefully getting people interested in the Xenoblade series.
​

cs-kuribo-challenge-64.285.title: [CS] Kuribo Challenge 64!
cs-kuribo-challenge-64.285.author: PakPecik
cs-kuribo-challenge-64.285.description:
Give yourself a little challenge and collect as many stars as you can by hopping around as a Goomba in his Iconic Green Shoe from Super Mario Bros 3!​

HOP into the action by literally HOP into the action! (Walking is no longer possible)​

The shoe's flat surface prevents you from drowning into the quicksand (Just try not to move more often)​

Higher triple jump, but lower normal jump​

Trouble when flying? there's a new way to do it: While performing Super Dropkick with the wing "cap", quickly press the A button to activate the wings on your back. You can also do this over and over again in the air as long as you got the wing cap​

Speaking of cap, you won't find some anytime soon, we're replaced them with TOTALLY NOT DEAD Goombas....​

You're immune to spinies now. Cause why not?​

Requires character select to play​

You may or may not drown faster with the use of the shoe in water​

Key of the moveset (GROUND POUND!):​

A new way to triple jump: When landing from a ground pound, press the A button to perform the higher triple jump

Super Dropkick: When ground pounding in the air, press the B button to perform a dropkick with a very HORIZONTAL directions, you can also do it when landing from a ground pound

Super Jump Kick: When ground pounding in the air, press the A button to perform a jump kick with a more higher range. Useful if you need a little boost upwards

If you think the distance of your dropkick is a little too far, just stop it with a ground pound. You can also ground pound in situations like jumping from a top of the pole or a little rising surfaces

Download the mod and receive yourself the Iconic Replica of the Green Shoe and  a TOTALLY REPLICA of the TOTALLY NOT DEAD Goomba with wings! ....Please?​

A CONTROLLER IS REQUIRED FOR MUCH SMOOTHER GAMEPLAY OF CHARACTER!​
THIS MOD REQUIRES CHARACTER SELECT MOD V1.11.2 AND ABOVE

Special Thanks to Melzinoff for the Goomba voicelines and the rest of SM64COOPDX Modding Community for helping me with Coding Materials!
​
​
All jokes aside, this is the first mod that i ever made and i'm looking forward to hear your opinions about the mod, how can i upgrade it,  the problems you encountered, and etc.
​
​
Therefore, feel free to contact me on the SM64COOPDX discord if you had any of these thoughts above
​
​
Last but not least, thank you for downloading my mod and Have Fun!
​
- PakPecik

cs-madeline.1177.title: [CS] Madeline
cs-madeline.1177.author: VioletSM64
cs-madeline.1177.description:
Madeline has climbed so many mountains she reached the Mushroom Kingdom...

Help her overcome her own insecurities and defeat Bowser who stole all of her strawberries (and the stars)!

Play as 
Madeline
, the young Canadian miss who loves to overcome challenges. Always ready for some most likely deadly platforming.

Or... play as 
Badeline
, the dark alter ego of Madeline. She is there to bring pain and torment to... herself?

This mod is complete with a brand new moveset based on the videogame 
Celeste, 
with all new controls that can change the usual Mario 64 experience!

CONTROLS:

DASH:

Press B to dash in the joystick's direction, you will go slightly up when dashing in midair.

Hold A or U-DPAD while dashing for an upward angle.

Hold Z or D-DPAD while dashing for a downward angle.

Hold no direction to dash straight forward, up, or down.

You can jump or kick from a grounded dash. Fly with the wing cap by crouching, then dash jumping.

You can jump or kick from a grounded dash, and dive from a midair dash.

Dashes will also automatically grab objects

CLIMBING:

Hold B to grab walls and hold towards it to climb up

Climb down by holding away and press A to jump up.

TIP: Jumping or climbing up uses more stamina than climbing sideways/down

Type /cel_controls if you need to see what the controls are for the Celeste Moveset

For advanced techniques, see the Celeste Wiki.

Mod also includes custom palettes for Madeline and Badeline based on some of their past adventures!

CREDITS:

VioletSM64: Pack Creator / Models

EmilyEmmi: Celeste Moveset Code

MelissaMekrose: Madeline/Badeline VA

Crystalika: Strawberry Model

cs-majid.785.description:
Have you ever wanted to play as MY OC? No? That's an expected response but too bad cuz

Majid is now in Coop DX as a Character Select mod!

And a custom moveset ! (Requires 
Easy Custom Moveset

Side Twirl: Instead of side flipping normally, Majid starts spinning around at high speeds ! You can go down faster by holding Z

Triple Long Jump: Pressing (or holding) A after a long jump will make you do a triple jump with more speed than usual!

Ground Pound Dive: Pressing B while doing a ground pound will make you dive​

cs-martlet.651.title: [CS] Martlet
cs-martlet.651.author: Micharus
cs-martlet.651.description:
Snowdin's former Royal Guard, reporting in.

Or sleeping in.

One of the two.

Martlet from Undertale Yellow is now playable in SM64 COOPDX!
​
This character mod includes:
​

Recolorability!

Custom voice lines by Ciozio!

Custom Cap in the form of the Royal Guard Guidebook!

Custom Lives and Stars icons, Power Meter, and Celebration Star!

Custom animations!

Custom moveset!

The odd feeling that she fits into this game a little TOO well!

Think about it!

And maybe more to come...?

Moveset Details
​

The power of flight! Martlet can fly without the need of a Wing Cap by pressing A in midair during a Triple Jump (or, of course, by using a cannon), but watch your Stamina Meter!

She gets five seconds of flight time without the Cap, and afterwards she starts falling like a... well, if you know, you know. Touching the ground, splashing into deep water, or using a cannon will fully restore Stamina, grabbing onto a pole in midair restores one second, and grabbing a coin restores half a second!

Pitching down won't speed you up much, and pitching up is... not recommended.

If you have some Stamina left, dive during a midair Ground Pound by pressing B. At the cost of one second, you can trigger flight again! Use this to get extra height or reach, or to easily change directions! Also, press A during 
any
 dive to trigger flight as well!

Press A during a midair Ground Pound to Long Jump instead! This risky move costs two seconds and is technically against safety protocol, but with good timing, you can use it to Wall Kick! Just remember: you can't Ground Pound during a Long Jump! Make sure it's worth the risk!

If you bonk into a wall while flying, hold A to flutter and slow your descent just like you would with the Wing Cap! This won't work if you're Long Jumping, though!

Triple Jump out of Ground Pounds by pressing A upon landing!

Martlet can fly 
ANYWHERE
 with the Wing Cap! Forget about air traffic control, no-fly zones, and Stamina Meters, the sky is 
YOURS! 
Pitch up as high as you want! Pitch down to go as fast as you want! This bird's gotta fly!

Be sure to follow safety protocol by pressing A to brake when necessary!

You'll keep flying if the Wing Cap wears off, but you'll have only three seconds of Stamina left. Get to a safe place to land!

Rumor has it that someone who shares vague similarities to Martlet may grant her something a bit better this time.

Additional Credits:
​

Team UTY (Character)

Emmalume (Design)

Ciozio 
(Voice Acting)

ZenderTroop
 (Additional Assistance, Humoring Me)

Kody
 (Bob-Omb Protocol)

Make sure you have Character Select Version 1.12 in order to use this mod!​

cs-moonwalker.1169.title: [CS] Moonwalker
cs-moonwalker.1169.author: frobissuck
cs-moonwalker.1169.description:
The stylish dancer with cosmical power.

Moonwalker
 from YOMIH Mod by InklessBrush is now available in sm64coopdx with his own moveset. 

Moonwalker
 don't have time to stay still. He'll be always moving even with no input. While he's in moonwalk, he can do higher jumps, double jumps, twirls, kicks and dives. And also he can dance with his very own song.

No input
 
- Moonwalking. You can control his direction by moving camera.

A Button while Moonwalking
 - Moonjump. Very high jump with stylish animation.

A Button while Moonjumping
 
- Midjump. Very low jump, but can be useful for air control.

Z Trigger while Moonjumping
 
- Twirl. Works like a regular Twirl, but you can also Midjump in it.

Z Trigger while Midjumping
 
- Dive. Faces away the camera and dives forward with some vertical speed applied.

L Trigger
 
- Dance. Makes a looping dance with some music turned on. Can't be used while in air.

Credits:

Your Only Move Is Hustle creator - Ivy Sly

Moonwalker mod creator - InklessBrush

Graphics and some coding - frobissuck

Idea author and coding - CrazyDany

cs-mother-64-pack.271.title: [CS] Mother 64 Pack
cs-mother-64-pack.271.author: MlopsFunny
cs-mother-64-pack.271.description:
[WARNING: THE PACK IS STILL IN BETA, REPORT ANY ISSUES TO ME!]
​

Welcome to the Mother 64 Pack! 
as of now, the pack's aim is to add all the main playable characters of the Mother Series (As of now, Ninten, Pippi Ness and Lucas), along with their variations to SM64 Co-Op Deluxe! In the future, more characters of the series will be added.

CURRENT ROSTER:
​

Ninten: This Psychic 12 year old is the grandson of the allusive George and Maria. He begins his adventure in Podunk, when a poltergeist happens at his house. the protagonist of the original Mother (design from Mother Encore)​

Alternate variations: Ken (Mother Novelization) and Douglas Halloway (Mother: Invasion from the unkown)​

Pippi: This girl who lives in podunk is always getting herself into a mess! She also has a thing for eating grass, so it seems? Legend has it she's based off a famous book's character!

Ness: An average 12 year-old with psychic powers, who left his hometown, Onett, after meeting a hero from a ruined future. the first out of the chosen four from Mother 2​

Lucas: A timid and nervous teen, who lost his mother and brother, Claus, at a young age. Protagonist of Mother 3.​

Alternate variations: Lucas (EarthBound 64 Design)​

This pack also incules:​

Unique Preset Palletes for every character and their variations!​

Custom Caps for each and every character!​

Custom Life Icons, Made by myself!​

​

Custom Power Meters, Also made by myself!​

No voices, currently, but they will soon be made!​

Fully Functional Invisibility cap and Metal Cap!​

NOTE: YOU MUST HAVE THE LATEST VERSION OF CHARACTER SELECT BY SQUISHY TO RUN THIS. IF IN DOUBT, REINSTALL IT FROM THE MOD PAGE.
​

cs-paper-partners-64-ttyd.47.title: [CS] Paper Partners 64 + TTYD
cs-paper-partners-64-ttyd.47.author: melzinoff
cs-paper-partners-64-ttyd.47.description:
Please make sure you have Character Select 1.11!!
​

Paper Partners 64 + TTYD is CS pack with 23 characters! It includes EVERY Paper Mario Partner! And includes sounds for every partner, some even voice acted! Also includes features to make it even more special.

Characters include:

Goombario                         - Goombella

Kooper                                      - Koops

Bombette                    - Madame Flurrie

Parakarry                           - Baby Yoshi

Lady Bow                                  - Vivian

       - Watt                          - Admiral Bobbery

Sushie                                 - Ms Mowz

Lakilester                                    

But it includes lot more bonus characters: Blooey, Torque, Hayzee, Screamy, Jerry, aka Luigi's partners are in too! As well as Piper, Shy bandit and Princess from Color Splash!!

But THAT'S NOT ALL:

All 7 baby yoshis are selectable through a skin selector made by wibblus!

All characters have custom caps, sounds and icons.

PM64 characters have custom celebration stars, the star spirits!

TTYD characters have custom celebration stars, the crystal stars!

Bowser moveset compatibility so that the koopas and Torque can go in their shell using their dive kick.

Armature magic to make some characters more polished~

Palette presets too!

Custom Power Meters for TTYD characters!

Thanks to Gauntlet Queen for voicing Watt, EllieSpectacular for the Admiral Bobbery voice, ordatz for the baby yoshi sounds, Lucina of Stardust for Flurrie's voice and wibblus for Vivian's voice.

Thanks wibblus for the overall support on this mod and Squishy for the palette presets!

cs-parappa-the-rapper.212.author: MlopsFunny
cs-parappa-the-rapper.212.description:
It's PaRappa!
​

PaRappa is a lovestruck rapper who is always fighting for his friends, and mostly for the love of his life, Sunny Funny. Whenever he runs into a problem, he never gives up and just keeps on believin'!

This 
[CS]
 pack features the following:​

Completely Original Model, Recolorability and Pallete Preset included!​

Voicelines, Taken from the games. Might make completely original ones in the future!​

A Unique Life Icon Render, as Always!​

NO Cap Switching or Captables, Parappa NEVER takes off the beanie, after all!​

PaRappa is one of my favorite games, so I put a lot of Passion and effort into this, you can expect a simple Boxy Boy Pet to release soon, to go along with him!

NOTE: YOU MUST HAVE THE LATEST VERSION OF CHARACTER SELECT BY SQUISHY TO RUN THIS. IF IN DOUBT, REINSTALL IT FROM THE MOD PAGE.

cs-peanut-marshal.1154.title: [CS] Peanut & Marshal
cs-peanut-marshal.1154.author: SideofSquid
cs-peanut-marshal.1154.description:
Peanut & Marshal from Animal Crossing as playable characters in Super Mario 64!

This is my first custom character mod and the first time I have ever rigged a model successfully. None of this would be possible without Garrulous64's amazing tutorial on how to do this along with the Coop Central discord server. I would've been able to complete this project sooner, however using Toad as the base model proved to be a mistake for these characters as I've had to do some manual adjustments to allow the limbs to be (mostly) normal. After meticulous testing, I am confident there are nearly no issues. These characters are complete with voices, blinking animations, no weird mesh overrides, and color customization!

CREDITS:

-The character select template by Squishy

-The original model from Animal Crossing Pocket Camp Ripped by Centrixe on The Models Resource

cs-pet-deep-cut-splatoon-3.820.title: [CS+PET] Deep Cut (Splatoon 3)
cs-pet-deep-cut-splatoon-3.820.author: funkymonkeyjay
cs-pet-deep-cut-splatoon-3.820.description:
It's 
Splatsville
's very own idol group, 
Deep Cut
, here to reap the spoils hidden within the 
Toadstool Castle
 walls of the 
Mushroom Kingdom
~!
​
FEATURES

My take on 
Shiver
, 
Frye
, and 
Big Man
, in the style that is somewhat akin to the SM64 model style, all recolorable!

A 
Salmonid Smallfry
 that follows you around, made possible with the 
"WiddlePets"
 mod, with fully recolorable hair as well!

A palette of faces for a wide range of expressions!

Some new animations!

New music for power-ups, star collect, mission selection... 
and a very special one hidden somewhere in the endgame
, which can all be turned on/off using the 
"/deepcut_mus"
 chat command!

Compatible with 
"Character Select"
 v1.14 onwards!

DISCLAIMER

This mod will only work if you have either one or both of the 
"Character Select"
 (If you just want to have the playable characters) or the 
"WiddlePets"
 (If you just want to have the Smallfry) mods enabled, which you can obtain through the following links:

Character Select [Squishy6094]

WiddlePets [wibblus]

Special thanks to 
@SwagSkeleton95
 for giving me tips on how to add custom music that can be turned on/off!

Credits to sources I've used for this mod + trailer are in the video's description!
​

cs-pet-luma.371.title: [CS & PET] Luma
cs-pet-luma.371.author: Alestar24
cs-pet-luma.371.description:
I have a memory stuck in my head, a memory of me and my brother on the sofa exploring distant galaxies. He was always player 1 and I was player 2, but despite i couldn't do much as P2 I enjoyed following him and defeating the enemies nearby.

So, if you too had the same experience as me and relive those adventures, then this mod is for you.

Welcome back Luma!

Here are the feature of this modpack:

1. A [CS] Luma Skin, fully recolorable and voiced.

He comes with an alternative style that replace him as a Lumalee (the suicidal cutie from the film) and 4 other costumes!

2. I understand that this is a very basic model (at least he is cute and floaty) so for the ones that doesnt like to be just a flying little star there is a [PET] Luma version included in the mod pack (as a separate mod).

Dont worry, the [PET] version still has recolorability, voices and all alt. styles!

So, are you ready to revive those memories? Because it is Luma time!!

(The modpack files contains the .zip files of the 2 mods separately, so you will need to extract it, then you can just drag and drop the 2 mod files in the game.)

cs-rick-kine-coo.1065.author: Kaktus64
cs-rick-kine-coo.1065.description:
Friends by air, sea, and land! The three animal friends from Kirby's Dream Land 2 are now a CS pack, all combined into one with a custom moveset! You'll swap to each animal friend depending on what you're doing.

Moveset:

Slide Kick: Turn into a giant rock and roll forwards.

Press A in air: Fly with Coo (Press A again to flap higher!)

B while flying as Coo: Spin with a parasol for a bit more height.

Ground Pound: Kine appears and slams downwards.

B during a Ground Pound: Dive forwards and cancel your ground pound.

cs-shy-guy-64-festive-dlc.453.title: [CS] Shy Guy 64 (Festive DLC)
cs-shy-guy-64-festive-dlc.453.author: Alestar24
cs-shy-guy-64-festive-dlc.453.description:
It is time to celebrate with the Shy Guys!

This CS skin pack should act as DLC for the original Shy Guy 64 mod, as it adds extra party-theme costumes for Shy Guy.

For now it contains 3 extra Xmas costumes (as is it nearly Xmas) but it will be updated with more stuff for each annual event.

So, lets see what is inside the present:

1. A Santa Shy Guy that is giving everyone toasts for Xmas, a little weird but YEAH TOASTS!

2. A Mini Shy Gal with a very warm and cozy winter jacket, so cute!

3. A Shy Guy with a ridiculous Xmas sweater, very itchy but at least its warm.

I hope you like this little Xmas present from me, happy holidays!

(P.S. This mod requires the latest Character Select mod version to work.)

This [CS] pack features a revisited model of the vanilla Shy Guy of sm64, but now he has recolorability, custom icons and sounds. Plus, there are A LOT of alternative styles to fully customize your own Shy Guy and more will arrive in the future (a big thanks to Squishy for helping me in the code for the alt. costumes).

So, what are you waiting for? It is Shy Guy time!

(P.S. This mod requires the latest Character Select mod version to work)

Who tf are you?!

This is My sona model i wanted to finally release after some weeks of development! it includes a moveset and Voice by yours truly... all credits on the github!

How the moveset works:

Momentum Groundpound: its just a groundpound that mantains your speed

Super dive: if you keep Z pressed while groundpounding you will do an petty cool dive (you can choose not do it if you only press Z once)

Walljump thing: If you dive to a wall and then press A you will get launched upwards!

Double jump: its a double jump. duh. you can do it meanwhile single jump, triple jump, dive, long jump, or freefall.

It features recolorability and custom anims. Hope you have as fun as we had making him!

cs-squishy.672.title: [CS] Squishy
cs-squishy.672.author: Squishy6094
cs-squishy.672.description:
The first public release of [CS] Squishy, A Character Select Pack meant to set a defining quality standard for modern Character Select Packs. This pack aims to deliver a fun and unique momentum-based moveset inspired by mods such as OMM, Pasta Castle, King the Memer, and More while utilizing all the Character Select API has to offer!

Put simple, uhmmm silly lady go zoom with codee!!! >.<

This release is made purely in celebration of my birthday!! Which of course means that this is not yet a finished product! I ask that you report ANY issues you encounter with the mod in the 
Github Issues
 for the mod as well as give feedback for what you think I can improve on! And also stay up to date by following progress in the 
Squishy Discord Server
!!!

This release features:

Squishy (x1)

 

A full Moveset making use of Character Select's Moveset Hooks

A Low skill floor, retaining base SM64 movement, Yet a High Skill Ceiling, Allowing for Practice-Perfect Gameplay

Near-Full OMM Support

Custom Host command for Manual Balancing 
/squishy-speed

An entirely custom camera, Doodell Cam!

Built and catered specifically for the Speed of Squishy

Inspired by OMM, Kero Quest, and Grace

Fully customizable via SM64CoopDX's Camera Settings
