cs-ssb-pikachu.1022.title: [CS] SSB Pikachu
cs-ssb-pikachu.1022.author: ProfeJavix
cs-ssb-pikachu.1022.description:
IMPORTANT: this mod needs Character Select to work

MOVESET
​

Normal Smash:
 press B to throw bouncing Thunderball. Can shock other players.

Up Smash:
 press Y to perform a Quick Dash to the stick direction. Press A to go up or Z to go down. Can be repeated instantly one time if the stick or the buttons are still held.

Down Smash:
 press X to cast a Thunder. Can be performed in air and shock-throws other players on hit.

Side Smash:
 hold B while ground pounding to charge a Skull Bash to the stick direction. The more charge, the more speed. Shock-throws other players on hit.

Moveset can be disabled via CharSelect options.

Original mod idea by Drenchy. Check out his video:

Check out Kog's showcase:

Credits:
​

lochteps for the model, sounds and some of the CS setup.
​

srGSR for WeatherCycleDX Mechanics

cs-super-mario-world.776.title: [CS] Super Mario World
cs-super-mario-world.776.author: Wall_E20
cs-super-mario-world.776.description:
Ever wanted Super Mario World's Mario playable in Super Mario 64? well, i do, thats why i made:

Super Mario World in Super Mario 64! [CS]

that's right! Super Mario World!

he is not just a simple reskin, he has 
Moveset!
 with it A LOT of custom actions!

since he is SMW Mario he can't do Mario's Default actions like punching or walljumping (that could be a problem with some parkour challenges... but feel free to switch to normal Mario any times!).

About his Moves:   

A to Jump
 - Press A to jump, simpler than that! he has only one jump, no double jumps or triple jumps. like in the original game: 
Hold The Jump Button to Jump Higher 
or 
Build up Speed 
to Jump even more!

B to Run
 - Hold the B Button to Run, He can get fast! maybe you manage to Jump over most of the difficult places like that.

Y to Spinjump
 - Spinjump! one of the most known actions from the SNES the spinjump! you can spinjump on most enemies! some will get defeated and do 
Poof!
 
others will get no damage so be careful!   you can also SpinJump on objects that need 
Groun Pound 
to be used, like the big Blue Coins Button!

X to Hold Objects
 - 
(is possible to use B to grab objects by enabling it in the mod menu)
 Since it could be done, the 
X Button is used to grab objects
 like boxes or bob-ombs, Remember that like the original game you have to 
Hold Down 
the X button to keep holding the object and 
Release it 
to throw it! 
It also works with Bosses such as Bowser!

Z to Crouch
 - Press Z to Crouch, Mario will not be abile to move when crouched, but if you move before crouching
 you will slide on the ground 
for a bit, allowing you to sneak in small places!

Objects and Interactions
 - Mario is also abile to interact with most objects: 
Open Doors By walking into them 
or 
Grab on Poles
 by jumping on them and press Up and Down to go Up and Down.

Water Movement
 - When in water, Mario can 
Swim By pressing A
. you can also Grab objects while underwater too!

Others 
- it may happens you get hurt, 
if you get at 4 Health Points you will get SMALL!
 right after playng the shrinking animation. But dont worry! 
Collect Coins To Heal your Health!
and 
you will return BIG again
. there are also Winning and Dieing animations, be sure to check them out!

While Jumping around the levels, you may notice some 
Slope Blocks 
run on them to 
Climb the Wall
 and get on top of places! 
(i placed them for you <3) (Thanks to ManIsCat for the slopes blocks code!)

- Stuff you may want to know

- Is this mod done?

this is a "Demo" Release because i was taking long to make this. 
in the future Expect some Changes! 
Like Power ups! from the game!

- Is Mario Recolorable?

yes, i added an alt Recolorable Costume
 (is an alt because i couldn't make it Palette Accurate)
 use that in case you want to use custom palettes!

is an 
ALT COSTUME
 accessed by 
pressing right
 in the cs menu
 (saying this because apparently people didn't notice)

- Does it works online?

this works online! i fixed most of the networking bugs, but don't expect to not find them! (report the non-online bugs too!)

- Does it have mod support?

it 
should
 work with most of the mods, don't expect it to work with all mods! 

THIS MOD ONLY WORKS IF CHARACTER SELECT IS ENABLED!

SMW Mario Can be choosen from the CS Menu

Be sure you are using the latest version!

don't expect this mod to do not have bugs or being accurate to the SNES!

This should be all! Thanks for reading and playng my mod! 

(Thanks again to ManIsCat for the Slopes Blocks code and Altiami and other people from Coop Central Discord server!)

cs-the-sugar-queen-gang.151.title: [CS] The Sugar Queen Gang
cs-the-sugar-queen-gang.151.author: MtgamesGnM
cs-the-sugar-queen-gang.151.description:
4 original characters have joined SM64CO-OP!  They all have unique personalities and vibes and stuff

BEA​
The candy thief herself​

Bea is a retired royalty with her goal being 1 thing and that is to obtain and consume the legendary Peach's Cake.  Even if she has to take down giant monsters, the cake is worth it all

Ms. CLOWN​
Bea's lanky sidekick​

Clown is here to aid Bea on her quest and help her reach some stars she might have more trouble collecting.  She stands at an 11 feet tall with her hair brushing against the top of every doorway she walks through

DILBO​
Clown's loyal pet​

Formerly a wild animal, Clown picked it up and holds it under her care.  However, dilbo tend to wander, so this one found its way in a place it probably shouldn't have.  It seems to have taken a liking to the culture of the Mushroom Kingdom and has picked up a few of its popular tunes

HORNETTE​
Bea's creepy stalker fan​

A strange entity from an unknown origin, Hornette is obsessed with Bea to the extent that she wants to be just like her.  The only issue is that she is so inept at understanding boundaries that Bea simply cannot stand her.  However that does not stop her from trying to get her #1 hero's attention.

NEW THINGS IN THIS SPECIFIC VERSION:​

Each character now has alternate costumes (Pictured Below)

Hornette is now fully-voiced by my friend Pickpen (Artist and character designer for Nessy the NES Robot)

All custom animations have been reset to default

cs-the-wastelanders.892.author: JimboJumbo64
cs-the-wastelanders.892.description:
[THE NEWEST VERSION OF CHARACTER SELECT IS NEEDED FOR THE FULL EXPERIENCE, USE IT AT YOUR OWN RISK]

This is a custom character mod pack for the main three protagonists of 
Disney's Epic Mickey
, Mickey Mouse, Oswald the Lucky Rabbit, and Gremlin Gus.

After beating the blot, the three heroes who saved wasteland are now saving a princess from a reptilian-looking monster.

This is the big update to my last mod, Wastelander Mickey, which now adds Wastelander Oswald and Wastelander Gus, and maybe some more things will come soon too.

Thank you everyone who helped me along the way making this mod.

[OLD] Here's the release trailer.

Ghosty and Salt helped me with .luaing, while I did everything else. And thank you to MrScaryHalloween for playtesting my mod.

I of course do not own these characters. Everything in this mod, besides the graffiti art, are from Disney, Disney Interactive, and Junction Point Studios.

cs-wario-land-64.1103.title: [CS] Wario Land 64
cs-wario-land-64.1103.author: SwagSkeleton95
cs-wario-land-64.1103.description:
Waah! It's been too long since the last brand new Wario Adventure! Maybe I should pick up the old treasure hunting sport again...This bounty for saving Princess Toadstool will do! What? This is supposed to be 
Mario's 
game?! Who cares!? Don't I deserve a little glory, too?? I'll just have to butt in and show how much better of a hero I truly am! No need to thank me, wahahaha! Now keep on reading to see what I have to offer!​

Five Differen
t Flavors of Wario!
​

I think I'll bring some of my best friends along for this adventure..! That's right, it's Me, and Me, and Me and Me and Me! This adventure lets you play as up to five of my beautiful selves! Play as the me from Land 3, 4, Shake it, Virtual Boy, and from my very first original game! If that isn't an amazing deal, I don't know what is, guhaha!

​

My Abilities!
​

My abilities are different from that lame show-off, Mario's! Enjoy playing as someone 
actually
 powerful for once! My shoulder-bash will easily take out any weak enemy that you hit with it, and it won't wait for any doors either! Wahahaha! Cool, huh? And that's not all of my awesome movement options, either! Bash, hold Z, and jump, and I'll do an awesome front flip! Let's see Mario do that!! Guhahaha! How about you find the rest yourself? My moves totally turn Mario's adventure upside down! Some things react differently to my abilities, so try to find every possible way to screw things up!

​
Get Stronger!
​
What, I'm still not tough enough for you!? You should have a little more respect! But your old pal Wario has you covered. Gather those shiny Power Star things to gain new, powerful versions of your abilities! How 'bout that? Take down multiple enemies with the 
Super Ground Pound!
 And not even Bowser will stand a chance against my 
Super Shoulder Bash!

​
Raise Your Rank!
​
Did you think this hero stuff was free!? No way! I deserve a little something too, you know? Those painting worlds are full of my favorite thing in the world: Coins. Help your pal Wario out and grab as many of them as you can! That Princess Toadstool had the right idea; I think I'll buy myself my own fancy castle with the money. I'll keep track of just how many you've found, and give you my personal, 
Wario-approved
 score at the end!

​
Find Treasure!
​
You'd better not think that strength is all you need to complete this adventure! Treasure hunting needs brains, too, you know!? And my brain is as smart as it gets. Each level has a valuable hidden gem somewhere in it, but you'll need to really explore to find some of them... I'm counting on you here! Each gem you find will multiply your ending score, so you can't miss out! There's sixteen gems in total, but...I thought there were only fifteen levels!?

​
Interact!
​
Sounds like everybody was expecting Mario! What, aren't they happy to see me instead!? All the friendly characters in the game will react differently to my awe-inspiring presence. Even the signs have re-written themselves to explain 
my
 controls instead!?

It doesn't stop at talking! I'll try bashing into someone to see if they have any goodies for me! It's a fair trade for saving their fancy princess, don't you think? Wahahaha!

​
What else do you want me to tell you!?​

What are you waiting for, huh!? Aren't you convinced yet!? There's still more to discover in the adventure, but I won't just tell you everything. Go find out for yourself! And a great big thanks to the developers of this mod for bringing my dazzling self into this game!

SwagSkeleton95 - Models, textures, HUD, Coding, Dialogue, renders, modpage​

Cheekimelon - Dialogue​

TheBoomerAgainstTheZoomers - Menu descriptions, Sound​

SullyBoy - Graffiti textures​

Morishiko & Baconator2558 - Ending jingles​

Sharen - Contributor​

Jerthepear - Contributor​

Kog64 - Contributor​

And the playtesters!

Wobbmin​

Hijacked​

SuperMoi64​

SchmooMaster​

BG​

THIS MOD REQUIRES THE LATEST VERSION OF SQUISHY'S CHARACTER SELECT MOD!

Watch the overview and trailer here!
​
Notes:

I'm aware of standard camera having some trouble with Wario's swimming. This will be fixed in the next update.

cs-wolf-odonnell.1184.description:
When i started playing sm64coopDX, way before i made an account on the site, i was hoping someone would make a mod for Wolf, but as far as i know, that never happened, so i hit the good ol' "fine, i'll do it myself"

This mod was originally private, as i only used it to play with my friend, but then i thought it would be nice to release it, it's also my first mod! way before i made Tigy.

I also made a moveset for him with the Easy Custom Movesets mod, so if you have this mod installed and want the complete experience, add this to initial-characterstats-table on the mod folder.

"{

    name = 'Wolf',

    walking_speed = 185,

    in_air_speed = 135,

    back_flip_strength = 110,

    jump_strength = 100,

    knockback_resistance = 1,

    wall_slide_on = true,

    in_air_jump = 1,

    in_air_jump_strength = 55,

    saultube_single_jump_animation = true,

    saultube_double_jump_animation = true

},"

Credits to the sounds resource website for Wolfie's voice.

Also special thanks to Pengy Plush and Garrulous64, for helping me make my first mod with these awesome tutorials!

despair-marios-gambit.103.title: Despair Mario’s Gambit
despair-marios-gambit.103.author: Ex Coop Mods Archive
despair-marios-gambit.103.description:
Original Post: July 12, 2022

Author: Sunk

Romhack by GMD.

There are 120 stars in this large romhack.

Slight warning that the credits course will be very laggy.

Known issues/inconsistencies:

Courses 9 and 12 are a bit fuzzy since there’s an issue with fog.

There are no actors since for some reason they didn’t want to work.

The first bowser fight has a starting textbox, which isn’t in the original hack.

Course 15 has a star select screen, which isn’t in the original hack.

There is no gate preventing Bowser 2 from being killed without going through the whole stage.

The hack has aglab camera; this port doesn’t.

Despair Mario's Gambit Update 
Romhack created by GMD Category: Romhack Overall improved experience: Now uses custom skyboxes Changed camera mode from 8 directional to romhack Stars now spawn in precisely the correct place (ignoring off-by-1 error)Added preview blue coins Course 15 no longer has an act selector Loading times should overall improve

Despair Mario's Gambit 
Quick update...literally (made loading a bit faster by not having unnecessary files)Also small changes Category: Romhack Making this update now because I've seen more people host this hack.

Despair Mario's Gambit
 update

Bowser 1 fight no longer shows the cutscene

Bowser fight entry cutscenes are disabled in this hack normally, but disabling it also removes the textbox. The bowser 1 fight was not supposed to have a textbox, so this is fine, but the bowser 2 fight does.

Fixed bowser 2 fight script errors

Bowser no longer moves in the bowser 2 fight

This is in the original romhack

In bowser 2 fight, there is now a metal box that blocks bowser's tail. This box can only be removed by usage of the switch at the top of the level. Before this, you could skip that entire climb since the gate couldn't block the throw.

The floor below the bomb in the bowser 2 fight now exists.

dgokis-moveset.1021.title: DGoki's moveset
dgokis-moveset.1021.author: Dgoki
dgokis-moveset.1021.description:
What is this moveset?

Is a funky moveset, fully made by me.

It was made to be powerful while not removing things like the ability to BLJ from the player.

I was going to keep this private, however many people asked me to release it, over weeks and months.

I am 11 months late on my promise to release this, so i remastered it to make it more enjoyable.

I thought for a while no one cared about this anymore but i was wrong about that.

So i updated this moveset and improved it by a ton.

This moveset includes:

Speed modifier 
[PRESS Y TO SWITCH]  
| (It includes 0,1x,0.5x,1.0x,1.3x,1.5x and 2.0x speed.)

Dir-Rotation   
[PRESS X TO SWITCH]
  | (Turn this off to BLJ or do similar things.)

Custom moves  
 [CAN BE DISABLED IN SETTINGS]
 | (Ground pound jump and dive, able to dive out of almost everything, able to quadruple jump, slide kick out of a dive with an A Press, etc.)

Here a list with all commands:

/dgm_help - Tells you basics about the moveset.

/dgm_moves - Tells you a list with the moves.

/dgm_reset - Reenters the level with full health. (good if you get stucked)

/dgm_version - Tells you the version. (Duh)

This is how the hud looks like:

Here a list with all the settings:

Special thanks to all the people that helped me test this goofy moveset.

drench-game.760.title: Drench Game
drench-game.760.author: EmilyEmmi
drench-game.760.description:
Inspired by Dani's Crab Game, which is based off of the Netflix series Squid Game, is... Drench Game! Commissioned by Drenchy, this mod lets you compete in 8 different minigames to earn the most points and win the prize of [insert high amount here] coins! FEATURING:

High quality custom maps
 by biobak and Woissil, and one low quality map by me.

Original soundtrack
 by murioz (one track by Awesome Seal Guy on YouTube).

Voice acting!?
 Featuring Espi as Toad, Trashcam as Waluigi, and Squeex as Mingle Callout (also Waluigi).

Totally legit ads
 made by Squeex's YouTube community!

TEAM MODE:
 Pick your own teams or select at random. Features auto-balancing for uneven teams.

ELIMINATION MODE:
 You lose a minigame, you lose it all. For either hardcore players or very short games.

And most important of all: the beds are bouncy.

Note: If you downloaded this mod in Drenchy's server prior to 6/28 at 8 PM EST, or the mod's name does not have a version number, you have an older version and should download this one. It fixes a major bug with the Duel minigame.

duels.9.title: Duels
duels.9.author: EmilyEmmi
duels.9.description:
This add-on mod lets players engage with 1v1 battles with each other at any time! Simply type /duel [player name] to request a duel! Other commands include:

/forceduel [NAME|ID,NAME|ID] - As a host or moderator, force two players to battle.

/bestof [NUM] - Set the amount of wins needed for a match.

/sky [0-2] - Set the background and music for a match.

/time [SEC] - Set the time until Sudden Death.

/forfeit - Leave a duel.

/spectate-duel [NAME|ID] - Spectate another duel.

You can also enter "random" for /duel and /forceduel to pick a random player. 
Do NOT use with game modes.

dynamic-lives-icon.232.title: Dynamic Lives Icon
dynamic-lives-icon.232.author: EmilyEmmi
dynamic-lives-icon.232.description: This mod changes your lives icon to match your palette. It also changes it based on what caps (or lack thereof) you're wearing! Also includes Character Select Support, and an API that allows you to add a recolorable icon for your character. See head.lua for details.

dynos-allergic-to-mountains-64-official-.title: [DynOS] Allergic To Mountains 64 Official Co-op Model Pack
dynos-allergic-to-mountains-64-official-.author: ThaGurlTIlly
dynos-allergic-to-mountains-64-official-.description:
Allergic To Mountains 64
 was a project I started for the Mario 64 PC port way back in 2020, it has since been basically cancelled, and as a final farewell, I decided to make one final update to the characters, when Allergic To Mountains began as Super Show 64, it was a coop mod, Mario and Luigi were the first models to be made for the project, and now we've come full circle, Mario 64 Co-op has gotten a lot of changes, those changes have resulted in updates to my models, done by third parties, that took creative liberties in order to add the new features, like custom colors, resulting in the removal of the cel shading i've grown so fond of, these updates done by myself, aswell as FluffaMario, takes no liberties, not only is the cel shading back, but the recoloring is still possible! this pack includes Mario, Luigi, both Wario models, as well as a completely new Toad!

Credits as well as official palette colors are in the included .Txt file​

Easy Custom Movesets

This mod allows anyone to add unique movesets to any character, no coding required. Just fill out the forms at 
ECM Form Website
, and in less than 5 minutes, your character with new moves.

Also, it comes pre-configured with over 
100 modded characters

Mods Integrated
" section to see who made then.

Adding/Editing Moveset 

Access 
ECM Form Website

Fill the name field, it should be the same as in Chracter Select menu

Configure the rest of the options for your character

Download the generated Lua config file without renaming the file

Place the file in mods/Easy-Custom-Movesets/moveset_configs folder

Enable Chracter Select, Easy Custom Moveset and your Character mod in-game

Select your character and play!

Integrating your mod

Inside your main.lua, after _G.charSelect.character_add ,  execute _G.customMoves.character_add to change the character stats.

		Code:
	

-- Default Character Select Code
_G.charSelect.character_add(
    "Custom Model",
    {"Custom Model Description", "Custom Model Description"},
    "Custom Model Creator",
    {r = 255, g = 200, b = 200},
    E_MODEL_CUSTOM_MODEL,
    CT_MARIO,
    get_texture_info("custom-icon")
)

-- Modify character stats if customMoves exists
if _G.customMovesExists then
    _G.customMoves.character_add({
        name = "Custom Model",
        swimming_speed = 500
    })
end

For example, to add support to the Iono character mod, I added line 61-63 to the Iono main.lua

escape-sequence.771.title: Escape Sequence
escape-sequence.771.author: Pseudonym929
escape-sequence.771.description:
Escape Sequence
​

This is a gameplay mod that adds a timed escape sequence after a player collects a star, similar to how levels work in Wario Land 4 and Pizza Tower.

During the escape sequence, the player must return to a portal located at spawn. The time limit is based on the player's proximity to the portal when they collect the star. If the timer runs out, the player will die and the star won't be counted.

This mod is somewhat compatible with custom levels, though isn't guaranteed to work for every star. By default the sequence is disabled in levels and areas where the player cannot return to spawn in vanilla, though these settings can be adjusted through chat commands.

How the Timer Works:

The timer uses multiple variables (italicized below) which can be adjusted by the server owner through chat commands. The formula for determining how much time you are given is as follows:

base timer value
 * (player's distance from spawn on the xz-plane / 
zero-radius
) ^ 
xz-exponent
 + player's distance from the portal on the y-axis / 
y-units-per-second
 * 30
​

Base timer value
 can be modified with the chat command "/basetime"

Zero-radius
 can be modified with the chat command "/zeroradius"

XZ-exponent
 can be modified with the chat command "/xzpower"

Y-units-per-second
 uses different values for when the player is above the portal versus when they are beneath it. The value for when the player is above can be modified with the chat command "/fallratio", while the value for when the player is beneath can be modified with the chat command "/climbratio"

All players can also change the sound that plays after they collect a star with the chat command "/warnsnd"

fix-that-rom-hack-camera-bug.586.author: EmilyEmmi
fix-that-rom-hack-camera-bug.586.description:
A bunch of people have been upset about a recent change to camera behavior in custom levels (more specifically, any level that uses the "Rom Hack" camera mode). 
You can fix this issue without this mod by simply toggling "Invert X" in your "Camera" options (see image).
 But since not everyone knows this, here's a mod I made in like 10 minutes that does it for you. Given that the Invert X camera option doesn't affect any other camera mode other than Free Camera, I'm of the opinion that this should be changed back to its behavior pre-1.2.0.

geoguessr-scavenger-hunt.188.title: GeoGuessr / Scavenger Hunt
geoguessr-scavenger-hunt.188.author: EmilyEmmi
geoguessr-scavenger-hunt.188.description:
GeoGuessr implemented into Super Mario 64! This game mode is somewhat similar to Hide and Seek, with a much greater emphasis on the "Hide". One player hides anywhere in the game, and the other players have to find them using picture/word clues.

This mod was originally made for BizzareScape's video. This version is more robust, and includes:

A built-in screenshot system

/hint, if you prefer words instead

Multiple options for automatic hider selection

Variety of settings

Automatic 100% file

OMM Rebirth support

Supports most, if not all rom hacks

NOTICE: 
For whatever reason, this mod is prone to desync issues. If you continuously have problems, you can try hosting with less players (or avoid players with a bad connection). You can also set both Auto SS Time and Auto SS Time (First) to OFF in the settings, and send screenshots manually with your computer's screenshot feature.

gore-frogger.252.title: Gore/Frogger!
gore-frogger.252.author: TheIncredibleHolc
gore-frogger.252.description:
A meteor has ruined your home, and now you must clear your way through dangerous random obstacles to find a new pond! There are a total of 7 different spawn-able obstacles, 5 of which will be randomly picked and spawned each round. This is a spin-off of our upcoming Gore/Hardmode mod, so expect blood and splats. PvP IS ENABLED, so knock each other around to ensure your own survival!

KNOWN BUGS: 
Due to extreme time constraints, some of these bugs were unable to be fixed in time. These will be updated and fixed in the near future!

-CoopNet jank will sometimes think players are crushed by Thwomps when they aren't. This can break rounds. If needed, type /Reset to force the round to end.

-Waluigi's hat will show up when he's on fire.

-Some objects (like blood particles) will double and triple as more players join.

Credits:

@TheIncredibleHolc
  (me!) - Started the project, programmed most of the mod and game-mode concepts. Made all the models and environments in blender, though Birdekek is a much better 3D artists and touched up the texture work.

@Cooliokid 956
  - Coolio did a lot of heavy lifting on some of the crazier functions, like raycasts with the hunter obstacle, custom camera work, and some other secret stuff. Frankly, this mod would not have been possible without his expertise! He's one of the smartest here, if not the best.

@birdekek
  - After I initially modeled all the obstacles, Birdekek did a full map cleanup with new textures and got everything looking 100x better.

@frijoles.z64
 
- Modeled the original Frog Mario custume, and did an absolutely amazing job at it! It also served as a template for the other frog characters.

@birdekek
  and 
Tilly
- For creating the other frog costume models of the remaining 4 selectable characters. Tilly has been especially helpful in her blender knowledge and has saved us on quite a few occasions!

@Warioplier
  - For creating a very nice 3D model of a pickup truck for the traffic obstacle. He also added Toad as the truck driver. Nice touch! 

And lastly, shoutout to the rest of the Gore team for keeping Gore projects tight-lipped and for providing valuable feedback, ideas, and testing: 
@Blocky
 , 
Saniky
, 
I'myourcat
, 
@Keeberghrh
 .. (You will see more from these guys in Gore/Hardmode, coming soon!)

gore-hard-mode.422.title: Gore/Hard-Mode!
gore-hard-mode.422.author: TheIncredibleHolc
gore-hard-mode.422.description:
Gore/Hard-Mode!​
Category: Romhack

Difficulty: 10/10

Take a dive into the challenging world of 
Gore/Hard-Mode!
 Often called "Real life Mario 64", this mod originally started as a port of Kaze's Unfair Mario 64. It quickly grew into a cursed lovechild between Unfair Mario and 'I Wanna Be The Guy' sporting ridiculous obstacles and gory inspiration from both. Be prepared to die numerous times in unexpected ways!

Features:

120 completely obtainable stars. 
(Some speed-run tactics may be needed!)

20 collectable challenge trophies with a special prize if you unlock them all. 
(Trophy hunt starts after 50 stars collected.)

Player behavior overhaul. Prepare for Splats, crunches, chomps, and many new ways to die!

All existing vanilla enemies now have new and upgraded behaviors.

Some levels have been modified for extra difficulty! 
(Can be disabled by using Romhack Compatibility mode)

Entirely original secret boss fight.

"I Wanna Be The Guy Mode" - Plays identical to the mod, but you start at zero stars. On death, all progress (Stars, keys, flags) are all reset back to 0... Current record is 21 stars!

Togglable options for in the Mod Menu. 
(
Romhack Compatibility, Enable Hell on Game-over, Enable PVP deaths, Enable IWBTG Mode, Enable Dizzyness.
)

Compatible with Rom-hacks, Arena, Flood, and more! 
(Enable Rom-hack Compatibility mode if needed.)

Gore Team

Incredible Holc 
- Project Lead.

@Cooliokid 956
  - Major technical contributor that kept this project going and brought the toughest ideas into existence!

@Blocky
  - Major technical work, enemy behavior contributor, lots of other things including the 
secret final boss
!

@birdekek
  - Contributor, built out a lot of the custom Hell level, added the "blood mist" when Mario dies.

Tilly
 - Contributor, created AMAZING models for the secret room trophies and the trophy hunt prize 

@saniky

greenscreen-room.915.title: GreenScreen Room
greenscreen-room.915.author: Mediocre Metastasis
greenscreen-room.915.description: replaces castle grounds with a green room. Nothing much else to say.

gun-mod-dx.15.title: Gun Mod DX
gun-mod-dx.15.author: AgentX
gun-mod-dx.15.description: This is a rewritten & overhauled version of my original Gun Mod for sm64ex-coop. I thought this would make a good mod to bundle with sm64coopdx. Personally, I would rate this at 4 stars because honestly, I was too busy with making it to the December 18th deadline to fully finish and polish Gun Mod. So while it mostly works and issues aren't that frequent, I still want to do a better job and come back to this mod at some point.

hallowoomy-on-spoopy-island.862.title: Hallowoomy on Spoopy Island
hallowoomy-on-spoopy-island.862.author: jonathanoflebones
hallowoomy-on-spoopy-island.862.description:
Hallowoomy
 
on
 
Spoopy
 
Island
​

This is a short romhack created by BroDute for Halloween 2015. It has 9 stars total and 3 very scary areas. This port is based on the 1.1 Version of the hack.

Also, Mario is an Inkling now, that's why his eyes are different.

hangout-christmas-machinima-map.986.title: [Hangout] Christmas Machinima Map
hangout-christmas-machinima-map.986.author: jonathanoflebones
hangout-christmas-machinima-map.986.description: A short christmas themed map with a custom song and no evident goal created by Bronzed_Mario3. It is unknown in what video it appears, but it's been now turned into a hangout map you can visit with the /xmas-machinima command.

hangout-dshanyies-sm64-custom-maps.1140.title: [Hangout] dshanyie's SM64 Custom Maps
hangout-dshanyies-sm64-custom-maps.1140.author: jonathanoflebones
hangout-dshanyies-sm64-custom-maps.1140.description:
This is a collection of 3 maps created by dshanyie with no stars that were converted into hangout maps, some of which have been used in SM64 Machinima videos before. This pack contains the following 3 maps:

-Mario & Luigi's House

-Yoshi's Island

-Green Hill Zone

I wouldn't recommend hanging out on this green hill version however as it is very broken and is just there for archive purposes.

You can teleport to any of these maps using the command "/dshan" alongside the following names:

"[broshouse|brosinside|yi|yi_inside|ghz]"

The house was also used in a few machinima videos before, do you remember which?

Have fun hanging out in these 3 areas!!

hangout-final-fantasy-7-gaia-overworld.6.title: Hangout - Final Fantasy 7 - Gaia Overworld
hangout-final-fantasy-7-gaia-overworld.6.author: BuckleyTim
hangout-final-fantasy-7-gaia-overworld.6.description:
This was supposed to be an April Fools joke entitled "FF7 FULL GAME (REAL)", but bugs and crashing errors got too far in the way for me to meet my self-imposed deadilne. Those are all fixed now, so I might as well upload what I consider to be pushing the limits of coopdx's ability to render exported maps as workable level entries.

This mod contains 3 hangout maps representing the northern, eastern, and western continents of FF7's overworld map. There are a few errors (such as the bridges on the west continent) but given how long it takes to export these maps it's passable I suppose.

Probably for the best if you play this with a mod that increases your movement abilities. Or maybe not, sometimes it's just cool to get lost in the world of another game from Mario's point of view...

Edit:

Access the maps by typing either /ff7-east , /ff7-west , or /ff7-north into the chat.

Also comes with a midislap I did of the overworld/main theme into a combo of the m64 and mario party 2 soundfonts.

hangout-glowshire-kingdom.1192.title: [Hangout] Glowshire Kingdom
hangout-glowshire-kingdom.1192.author: Edasd
hangout-glowshire-kingdom.1192.description: One of the classic hacks used in the machinimas community is also now playable in sm64 coopdx, This map was heavily used in the classic smg4 videos and you can do blooper related videos if you want.If you want to enter the map say"/glowshire" in the chat and there pipe near the water. Please note that this map is really old so there might be collision issues

hangout-mcdonalds.43.title: Hangout - McDonald's
hangout-mcdonalds.43.author: Chilly
hangout-mcdonalds.43.description:
Welcome to McDonald's!
 
(yes, really.)

This is a hangout map themed around an iconic (for better or worse) restaurant you've probably eaten at before. This is the 1.0 release, so it's just the restaurant and a basic surrounding area.

This map was mostly just a pet project to learn more about Blender and is actually my first map made for Co-op.

A very simple implementation is provided to allow people to access the map through the 
/mcd
 command. Feel free to change the method of warping there to better fit your server!

hangout-romhack-marios-house-tomatobird8.title: [Hangout/Romhack] Mario's House (Tomatobird8 Version)
hangout-romhack-marios-house-tomatobird8.author: jonathanoflebones
hangout-romhack-marios-house-tomatobird8.description:
This is an old level model created a long while ago by Tomatobird8 of what's meant to be Mario's House. 

There are a lot of old hacks like this one that are just a single level with no objects, and I feel like they could work well as hangout maps. The Map has 2 Houses and 2 connected pools, and a few item boxes in the hangout version. use /house-tb8 command to warp to the house. You can hang out in here and make machinimas in 60fps or something like that.

I'm also uploading the original romhack version of the level, for archival purposes.

hangout-romhack-marios-house-virtualbloc.title: [Hangout/Romhack] Mario's House (VirtualBlock Version)
hangout-romhack-marios-house-virtualbloc.author: Edasd
hangout-romhack-marios-house-virtualbloc.description:
A Fun Hangout Map replacing Bob-omb Battlefield is now converted to a hangout map with the command

"/house-vb" To enter the map but I will also provide the original romhack version but I recommend downloading the hangout one. The purpose of this map is for roleplay like activity its pretty small but there could room to do it still.

hangout-romhack-smexy-town.1070.title: Hangout/Romhack] Smexy Town
hangout-romhack-smexy-town.1070.author: Edasd
hangout-romhack-smexy-town.1070.description: A very old savestate map that smg4 used to make videos on Is now A Playable Hangout Map In sm64coopdx, Special Thanks for Alessio Saturno For making the savestate map. To enter the map say "/smexytown" in chat. There is also pipe near the playground if people want to exit the map. I will also provide the romhack version replacing bob. But I recommend downloading The Hangout. Hopefully you enjoy.

hangout-shy-star-village.374.title: Hangout - Shy Star Village
hangout-shy-star-village.374.author: Alestar24
hangout-shy-star-village.374.description:
Apparently all those Shy Guys that came in Peach's Castle recently decided to build their own little harbor town (probably because they were too many so they no longer fit inside), and now they are inviting you to visit this little place called Shy Star Village:

This place is a very simple town (inspired by star road) where you can go after venturing who knows where in order to relax, chat with friends or even roleplay.

This town feature a big main mansion, a little restaurant where you can recharge your energy, a pipe to get back at Peach's castle, a simple parkour to warm up for the next adventure and a lot of little cute houses, all with furniture inside!

I wish you a pleasant stay here at Shy Star Village!

(This is an hangout map, the warps should work with most of the rom hacks. Plus, note that this is my first ever map, i created this as a test ground to learn how maps making works. I had a lot of fun making this, but there could be some bugs around. If u find any, DM me on discord pls. Have fun!)

hangout-smg4-showgrounds.779.title: Hangout: SMG4 showgrounds
hangout-smg4-showgrounds.779.author: RPG4
hangout-smg4-showgrounds.779.description:
DISCLAIMER: THIS IS A WIP, PLEASE BE PATIENT, I DON'T HAVE A LOT OF TIME RIGHT NOW

The showgrounds used in popular Youtube series SMG4, now in SM64! use /smg4 command to enter the map

disclamer:  there is no exit route yet, so if you use this mod, be sure to use a mod that lets you go higher (so as to trigger fall damage when playing singleplayer) alongside this one! I plan to fix this in a later update 

In later updates, I plan to add better textures, improve overall detail, and add an exit pipe

DON'T USE WITH MCDONALDS HANGOUT ENABLED AS WELL

helicopter-lifestyle.474.author: Kristall
helicopter-lifestyle.474.description:
Mario decided he had enough, he ditched plumbering, and went to fulfill his childhood dream, being a helicopter! Be wary of walls though... Remember you're a helicopter.

(Y) to Start flight

(A) to Throttle upwards

(B) to Descend

(X) to Accelerate forwards

Wing cap makes you faster.

hide-and-seek-dx.512.author: Dan_SM64
hide-and-seek-dx.512.description:
A full rewrite of the Hide and Seek mode that improves the overall experience.

Improved stability, design, and game flow.

insta-death.559.title: Insta Death
insta-death.559.author: Q10isarobot
insta-death.559.description:
Can you beat SM64 if any damage kills you instantly?

This is a simple challenge mod for SM64.

If the player takes any damage including fall damage they will die immediately.

you can still swim normally underwater and regain your health when you resurface, but any other damage in the game will kill you immediately.

compatible with all game modes and rom hacks!

This is just a simple challenge mod, I like seeing videos like "can you beat sm64 if ____" (cant jump, floor is lava, ect) but most of those videos are using classic romhacks and I want to bring some of those challenges to SM64 coop

I may make other similar challenge mods for coop in the future

instabub-support-on-demand-bubbling-and-.title: instabub // Support on-demand bubbling and bubble warping to friends
instabub-support-on-demand-bubbling-and-.author: cdario
instabub-support-on-demand-bubbling-and-.description:
instabub​
Support on-demand bubbling and bubble warping in sm64coopdx.

Controls​

D-Pad Up: Instantly enter bubble

D-Pad Up-3x (rapidly): de-bubble

While in bubble:

D-Pad Down: Warp above player (cycles thru players in a loop)

inverted-music.426.title: "Inverted" Music
inverted-music.426.author: PixelatedCheese1
inverted-music.426.description: A music mod that makes all music and jingles "inverted." so that the high notes were low and the low notes were high, while preserving the tonal distance between the notes. Just a silly mod made by Pixels.z64 on his free time. I was surprised to see the results!

izesavestates-v2-1-5-mod-release-develop.title: iZeSaveStates v2.1.5 [MOD-RELEASE] (Developed by iZePlayz)
izesavestates-v2-1-5-mod-release-develop.author: iZePlayz
izesavestates-v2-1-5-mod-release-develop.description:
Adds SaveStates to SM64EX-COOP!​

Save up to 4 states at the same time by using the 4 D-Pad buttons

To load states, hold down L and press the corresponding D-Pad button

Each player gets their own 4 local savestate slots (Global SaveStates maybe in the future)

Commands and local settings​

Use /autoload or /al to toggle AutoLoading the latest savestate upon death

Use /autoheal or /ah to toggle AutoHealing after loading savestates

Use /savestates, /savestate, or /ss to get infos about your local settings and slots

Changelog​

SaveStates are now much more accurate and precise

You will now be automatically teleported/warped into the correct level, area and act when loading a SaveState

[HOTFIX-1] Fixed a Softlock-Bug that occurred when entering a level/loading zone under specific circumstances

[HOTFIX-2] The normal coin counter, the amount of already collected red coins and the amount of “collected secrets” are now no longer affected by loading savestates.

Removed the unnecessary color codes in the “mod-name”

Removed Herobrine and added Wario Apparition

kaizo-mario-64-2.841.title: Kaizo Mario 64 2
kaizo-mario-64-2.841.author: jonathanoflebones
kaizo-mario-64-2.841.description:
An unofficial sequel to Kaizo Mario 64 created by MarvMario and MrMarioTendo, it has 108 stars across the vanilla levels, but with more enemies, moved objects, and plenty of fire, AND chuckyas. 

Like I said There's 108 stars total, however Bowser 1 and 3 were unaccessible for strange reasons, so I've removed the doors for those. Don't just go immediately for the final boss though, go beat those Kaizo levels why don't you? 

And also, some of the dialog is in german as well, mainly the course names.

kaizo-mario-64.829.title: Kaizo Mario 64
kaizo-mario-64.829.author: jonathanoflebones
kaizo-mario-64.829.description:
A hack made by OmegaEdge29 and Released in 2009, Kaizo Mario 64 is a romhack of the game that cranks up the difficulty by a 
BRUTAL
 amount.

It fills every level with annoying enemies, deadly fire, and other kinds of dangerous traps. Even though the level geometry is the same, collecting all 120 stars is one HELL of a challenge. 

There was an old port of this hack, but as far as i know that one is very old, dated, and inaccurate. Plus it was never uploaded to this here mod site.

This version also improves on that porting it from scratch and fixing all incorrect object positions and bugs that caused the original port to be unbeatable in certain levels. And as far as i know all stars are possible so, good luck.

.​

kapis-rock-n-roll-moveset.547.title: Kapi's Rock n Roll Moveset
kapis-rock-n-roll-moveset.547.author: Kristall
kapis-rock-n-roll-moveset.547.description:
It's time to Rock n Roll!

Controls:

(Ground) A: Jump |

(Air) Hold A: Twirl

(Ground) Hold Z: Roll

(Air) Hold Z: Dive

Land a Dive with neutral Joystick: Pound

(Air) B : Dash

B > A: Dash Cancel

Neutral Roll > A: High Jump

Roll > A: Long Jump

Dive > A: Slingshot Boost

(Wall) A: Walljump

L: Cam-lock

You can grab with a Dive or Dash

  Underwater:

Joystick: Move

A:Up | Z: Down

B:Underwater Dash | B > A/Z: Underwater Twirl

You drown quicker as Kapi!

Original Roblox Game made by PaperKitty, if you have the time, you should play it, it's peak.

kart-battle-modes.44.title: Kart Battle Modes
kart-battle-modes.44.author: EmilyEmmi
kart-battle-modes.44.description:
Note: The file containing the mod is called "Shine Thief.zip".

It's every battle mode from the Mario Kart series, now playable in sm64coopdx! Featuring many stages, (somewhat janky) Rom hack support, and 
support for all Arena and Tag maps.

Contains the following features:

ITEMS! 
18 unique items, such as Red Shells and Super Stars. You can set these to Frantic or Skilled for more or less powerful items respectively, or turn them off for classic Shine Thief gameplay.

OMM Support!

Various maps from across Super Mario 64

Many variants, such as being on Shells or having a Boost

API that lets you create your own variants and more

Included with this mod is 
Arena Base Stages
, which adds stages from the original Arena mode, and 
Arena DX Stages
, which adds stages featured in sm64coopdx (+ Space Central). Both are compatible with both versions of coop, and credit goes to their original authors, such as AngelicMiracles.

Credits:

Programming: EmilyEmmi (main), EmeraldLockdown (network), NeedleN64 (ceiling climbing speed up), Agent X + others (arena spring code/minor stuff for held items)

Resources: Blocky (Shine model), byNinten501 (Moon model on Models Resource) NeedleN64 (SSL painting), djoslin0 (Shell Rush), Agent X + others (Fire Flower model), viandegras (boomerang model), Mario Kart 8 Deluxe (Feather model), Chilly (McDonald's painting), LeoHaha (crown graphic)

SFX: Various from Mario Kart series + Super Mario Odyssey; Super Mario Sunshine sfx provided by NeedleN64

Arena maps: AngelicMiracles + others

Mod icon: HiEpik!

kazuma-kiryu.302.title: Kazuma Kiryu
kazuma-kiryu.302.author: Mediocre Metastasis
kazuma-kiryu.302.description:
"Come at me if you want to die!"​
This mod adds Kazuma Kiryu from Yakuza into Mario 64.

Can be used with character select or typing 
/kiryu on
 in chat.​

This mod gives Kiryu new animations, a new moveset comprising of a new attack combo and a dropkick, and revamped boss battles where you attack them by punching them rather than throwing them.

Kiryu's punch combo replaces Mario's attack when you press B. Punching slightly moves Kiryu forward:

Kiryu's dropkick replaces Mario's dive when on the ground:

The revamped bosses include:

King Bobomb

Bowser 1, 2, and 3

BUGS:​

King Bobomb star doesn't warp the player out of BOB when collected

Chainchomp sometimes does not get flung

If any one knows how to fix these bugs notify me. You can view my code through my Github page here 
GitHub - Smoah06/kazuma-kiryu-mario-64-coop-dx
.

kings-devtools.339.title: King's Devtools
kings-devtools.339.author: king the memer
kings-devtools.339.description:
While developing King I realized it was often a pain in the ass to test certain things, so

I thought id compile some neat tools together that anyone can use with ease to test their mods

CONTROLS:

D-Pad Up - Toggle Debug Movement

D-Pad Down - Toggle Stats Display

D-Pad Left - Open Level Select

D-Pad Right - Open Cap/Power Select

DEBUG MOVEMENT:

Use the debug movement to quickly travel

through any level without taking damage

It can also open doors

A - Go Up

Z - Go Down

B - Move Faster

STATS DISPLAY:

Use these stats to test custom actions, determine

exact positions to place objects, and more

SPD -
m.forwardVel

VEL -
m.vel

POS -
m.pos

ANG -
m.faceAngle

ACT -
m.action

LEVEL SELECT:

D-Pad Up/Down - Switch Level

D-Pad Left/Right - Switch Star/Act

A - Confirm

B - Exit

CAP/POWER SELECT:

The Klepto option sends Mario's cap to

Klepto in Shifting Sand Land (to test capless models)

D-Pad Left/Right - Switch Cap

A - Confirm

B - Exit

L MODE:

When enabled, the tools are only active when holding L

If not holding L the D-Pad will do nothing and the

Devtools icons will be fully hidden

komodo-joe.517.title: Komodo Joe
komodo-joe.517.author: Aso-Designer
komodo-joe.517.description:
One of the second bosses of Crash Bandicoot 2 : Cortex Strikes Back. 

Joe is part of the Komodo Brothers , a duo of komodo dragons known for their sword fighting skills.

Joe is highly intelligent, and consider the mammals inferior to him.

learn-to-make-code-mods-resources-and-tu.title: Learn To Make Code mods Resources and Tutorials
learn-to-make-code-mods-resources-and-tu.author: Q10isarobot
learn-to-make-code-mods-resources-and-tu.description:
Do you want to make Code mods and don't know where to start? Start here!!!

This mod contains many useful code resources that are easy for a beginner to understand and use.

I have also made a tutorial (featured below)  and more are planned to come.

this mod contains SEVERAL code mods in one folder, they are meant to be used as starting points for you to make your own mods

RESOURCES:

HoldLtoenterPU.lua = this is the mod that is made in my tutorial video, hold L to multiply players current speed * 2.

this will allow you so much speed that you can clip into 
parallel universes
.

PlayerSizeControl.lua = press dpad up or down to make player bigger or smaller, press Y to return to 0

PressLtoResetinStartMenu = while the game is paused, press L to reset players position to the start of the level. this is a conveniant way to prevent softlock. ROMHACK MAKERS: you can copy this code into the main.lua file in your romhack, this is great for testing maps or just keeping players from getting softlocked.

PressUptoSpawnRandomEnemy.lua = press the up button to spawn a random enemy near the player

Simpletimer.lua = a timer that counts up every second as you play

CyclethroughActions.lua = view all of the actions in the game (minus some that would cause softlock)

Cyclethroughmodels.lua = view all of the 3d Models in the game (minus some that dont show up)

Soundtest.lua = test all sounds from the game (minus some that are silent)

Bigmario Example.lua = an example of mini mario and Mega mario powerups

SpawnanevilSmiley.lua = an simple example of a custom Enemy

TUTORIAL:

LINKS:

Hooks List

Mario State

Constants

More Examples

Player Sounds

PERMISSION

all of the code in this mod is free to use in your mods no credit.

this is a resource to use as a starting point to make your own mods

livesplit64.382.title: LiveSplit64
livesplit64.382.author: Isaac0-dev
livesplit64.382.description:
This is a simple coop mod that I made in an attempt to make a LiveSplit clone. For those who don't know: "LiveSplit is a timer program for speedrunners that is both easy to use and full of features." - 
LiveSplit
 I made this because I had the idea to be able to see each other's splits on the same LiveSplit window. This coop mod syncs with each player, so you can see when someone splits in real time. It comes built in with an autosplitter, so hopefully no need to split manually at the moment. To open a simple menu, press D-pad up and C-up at the same time. On this menu, you can move the timer around to where you want. There are a few buttons, allowing you to start/stop and reset the timer, and edit splits. Splits are saved thanks to mod storage on the host's machine only, but splits are synced when players join. I'd love some feedback on this mod! This was just something I decided to make as a fun challenge, so it's not exactly overflowing with features at the moment. I hope this mod is useful!

luigis-mansion-64-marce-version.761.title: Luigi's Mansion 64 (Marce Version)
luigis-mansion-64-marce-version.761.author: jonathanoflebones
luigis-mansion-64-marce-version.761.description:
A very strange romhack that also happens to be Titled 'Luigi's Mansion 64' but that's where the relation to Mansions ends, it was created by an user named Hacker Marce. RHDC says the release date is unknown but I can confirm that this hack is incredibly old, maybe around 2008 to 2009-ish.

I tried to port it as accurately as I could to preserve this old oddity hack once I remembered it's existence once again. It contains a few weird custom levels as well as various alterations to vanilla levels. The only one I couldn't get working as of now is Lethal Lava Land, as it seems to have been modified in very primitive software and current Romhack Porting Tools can't take account for that. I believe it'll have to be recreated manually, which I may try eventually.

There's also a bit of text in spanish, strangely not for the rest of the game though.

If you're curious as to what this is, go ahead and download it. See if you can make any sense out of it. There are 7 stars that can be obtained but you can go further than that if we count vanilla levels.

mario-size.935.title: Mario Size
mario-size.935.author: _rd64_
mario-size.935.description:
Requires sm64coopdx v1.4 or above

Mario Size lets you shrink or grow Mario on the fly, changing how he moves around!

How it works

Shrink Mode:

Controls: Hold Y

Effects: Mario gets smaller and walks faster

Grow Mode:

Controls: Press Y twice, hold on the second press

Effects: Mario gets bigger, walks slower, and makes the ground shake with each step

Reset Size:

Controls: Press X

Effects: Mario instantly goes back to normal size

Perfect for speedruns, challenges, or just messing around!

Enjoy experimenting with different sizes and finding new ways to play!

Changelog v1.0.1

Bug Fixes

- Level Entry Freeze: Added validation to prevent logic execution during cutscenes

Multiplayer Enhancements

Added Bowser footstep sound effects

Optimized camera shake system

Implemented additional jump shake feedback

Increased maximum size limit

Full multiplayer compatibility maintained

This will serve as the stable release for the time being. I don't plan on updating it until I have significant changes to implement. It's functioning correctly now, but this update was essential.

mario.126.title: MariO
mario.126.author: PeachyPeach
mario.126.description:
Portals in Super Mario 64.

Inspired by Portal (the game).

Controls:

D-pad left: Shoot a blue portal.

D-pad right: Shoot an orange portal.

D-pad down: Close both portals.

D-pad up: Enable/disable first person mode.

Portal shots open a portal when they collide with a surface, an object or another player.

When two portals are open, touch one of them to get teleported to the other one instantly.

You can move almost any object from a portal to another, including other players.

In first person mode, move the camera with the mouse or the right stick.

The first person camera uses the settings of the free cam, so, if you want to change the sensitivity of the camera or invert the axes, pause the game, open the Options and go to Camera.

Bind D-pad left/D-pad right to your mouse left button/right button for a better experience.

Credits:

Authors
: PeachyPeach

mh-control-hunters.900.title: (MH) Control Hunters
mh-control-hunters.900.author: ProfeJavix
mh-control-hunters.900.description:
Important: MarioHunt must be loaded to use this mod

In this MH extension, runners will have a menu from which they can select and control a player from the opposing team. After selecting a hunter, the runner will control them for a period of time while the hunter spectates helplessly. When the time is up, the runner will return to their original position. But beware, if the controlled hunter dies, the runner will also die!

Mod Menu Options:

Control Seconds (5-60 seconds):
 set the period of time in which the runner can control the hunter.

Cooldown Seconds (0-30 seconds):
 set the cooldown in which the runner will have to wait to control a hunter again

Original mod idea by Drenchy. Check out his video:

mh-powerups.622.title: (MH) Powerups
mh-powerups.622.author: ProfeJavix
mh-powerups.622.description:
NOTE: BEST PLAYED WITH MARIOHUNT

This mod adds some powerups to give variety to the gameplay.

Currently there are 4 powerups:
​

Hammer
​

Fire Flower
​

Boomerang
​

Cannon
​

Each one has a moveset, so read the controls on screen and perform the desired attack. You can grab them on every level and if you do, there will be a cooldown, so use them wisely.

There's a 
Randomized Mode
, where powerups are unknown, so you'll never know which one you will pick until you grab it. Good luck...

Check the Mod Menu to show/hide controls, allow/block powerups for hunters and toggle Randomized Mode.

Huge credits to 
Arena Mod
 for inspiring some powerups (specially the hammer) 

This mod was a bounty from Drenchy. Visit his channel!
​

mh-secret-helpers.898.title: (MH) Secret Helpers
mh-secret-helpers.898.author: ProfeJavix
mh-secret-helpers.898.description:
In this MarioHunt extension, you can give some players the role of "Helper," which makes them invisible and gives them the purpose of trolling the opposing team.

Important: 
You must load MarioHunt with this mod!

Use:

To make a player a Helper, the host must type the corresponding command and select the desired player. This player will then become a helper for their current team until the host removes that role (or, in the case of Runners, until all non-helpers are eliminated and the Hunters win). It is recommended that this assignment take place before the match begins. Helpers can't collect stars, coins, keys nor grab things, so go melee!

Chat command:

/sh-toggle : toggles the Helper Selector menu (only for host)

Mod Menu Options:

Rival helpers can see each other: Allow helpers from a team see the helpers of the other one and viceversa

Runner helpers can exit level anytime: Remove the level exit restriction from MH on Helpers

Original mod idea by Drenchy. Check out his video:

milne-the-crystal-fox.194.title: Milne the Crystal Fox
milne-the-crystal-fox.194.author: steven3004
milne-the-crystal-fox.194.description:
Trailer:

You ever wanted to be a silly crystal fox zooming around stages, throwing rocks at enemies and do Russian dances?

No?

Well here's the mod anyway.
​
Milne just somehow got transported to Mario's world and she decided to help save the princess, I guess.

Usage
:

As a standalone mod:
​

Type 
/milne on|off
 to toggle the character.​

Type 
/milnecolor on|off
 to toggle recolorability.​

As a CS Character:
 Two options for a non-recolorable Milne and a recolorable Milne will be in the menu.​

Moveset
:

Twister Thok: 
In the air, you can press A to start a Twister Thok. You can use it two times. First time will launch you upwards, second time downwards. Hold a direction, and you will lunge forwards in said direction. Otherwise it'd be your average double jump. If you try to do this move more than once without landing, you'll immediately launch downwards.

Melee (Punch, Kick and Dive replacement):

Shard Toss: 
Tap B once, and Milne will throw three crystal shards at once, acting as a projectile that damages enemies and players in PVP.

Crystal Lance: 
Quickly double tap B, and Milne will take out her lance and glide across the air in a short time. If she hits a wall, she'll stick to it, and you can either jump off of it 
(A)
, kick off of it 
(B)
, or drop off of it 
(Z)
. You can only use it once.

Grab: 
Getting near a grabbable object and press B will make Milne effortlessly pick it up.

Passive:

No Swimming: 
Milne can't swim, but she will have a slightly tweaked version of her ground moveset:

Twister Thok: 
Milne can now jump up more than once in the air in case she does the move again.

Crystal Lance:
 Milne can now use the move more than once with a 1-second timer if she's off-ground.

Weight:
 Due to being made out of crystals, Milne is denser and heavier, therefore she falls faster than most characters. And when she lands from certain heights, she'll create a shockwave that kills everything in its radius except for players. Her fall damage is also delayed a bit.

Kazotsky Kick (Taunt):

By pressing X as a Milne player while idling, you will do start dancing.

As a non-Milne player, you can go up to a dancing player. When an icon appears above the dancing player, you can press X and join 'em. Each vanilla character can have a unique dance, and you can make your character have a unique dance with this template file below:

This file makes Wario be able to only activate the dance while walking instead of idling and gives him Waluigi's dance.

With that out of the way, I hope y'all enjoy this mod!

​

Credits
:

steven3004
: Almost everything in this mod.

ganewatch
: Projectile code borrowed from Mega-Man X.

CrystallineGazer
: Milne's Mother.

The original SRB2 Milne mod
: The other things.

Voice Actors Sampled:

AJ Michalka (She-Ra and the Princesses of Power)

Erica Lindbeck (Helluva Boss, Mortal Kombat 11)

Ashly Burch(Mortal Kombat X)

Known issues:

- Bowser throwing might not sync too well.

- Kazotsky Kick icon might bug.

minecraft-music-mod.324.title: Minecraft Music Mod
minecraft-music-mod.324.author: iZePlayz
minecraft-music-mod.324.description:
# 
 
Minecraft Music Mod v3.0
 
 

Category: Audio

### 
What's New in v3.0:

Enhanced Randomization:
 The randomization of track selection has been significantly improved for a more varied and enjoyable listening experience.

Code Overhaul:
 A substantial amount of code has been rewritten, leading to better performance and stability.

Bug Fixes:
 Various bugs have been resolved to ensure smoother operation.

New Commands:
 Added 
/songlist
 to list all tracks and 
/skipto <Song-ID>
 to skip to a specific track by its ID.

### 
Mod Description:

This mod brings the original 41 tracks from C418's Minecraft soundtrack into your gameplay. The default in-game music is disabled, and the mod plays the Minecraft tracks in a random order. After each track, there is a brief pause of 10 to 20 seconds, mimicking the music transitions found in Minecraft, but with shorter delays.

Features:

Original Soundtrack:
 Plays all 41 tracks from C418's Minecraft soundtrack randomly.

Random Intervals:
 Pauses of 10-20 seconds between tracks for a more authentic Minecraft experience.

Default Music Disabled:
 The game's default background music is turned off.

Commands:

/skip
 - Skip the current track and play the next one.

/song
 - Display the current track and show the time remaining until the next track starts.

/songlist
 - Lists all songs with their ID, name, and filename.

/skipto <Song-ID>
 - Skip to the specified track by its ID.

### 
Important Installation Information:

To ensure the mod functions correctly, 
all 4 parts of the mod must be loaded and enabled
. You can do this in one of two ways:

1. 
Extract Method:
 Extract all 4 folders from the zip file into your game’s mods folder.

2. 
Drag and Drop Method:
 Drag and drop the 
minecraft-music_v3-0_all-parts.zip
 file into the game. This will automatically load all 4 parts at once.

Note for Game Hosts:
 If you are hosting a game, make sure that all 4 parts of the mod are enabled on your server to ensure the Minecraft music plays correctly for everyone.

mirror-mode.707.title: Mirror mode
mirror-mode.707.author: Pipocalio
mirror-mode.707.description:
This mod adds a mirror mode to Super Mario 64, flipping the entire game world horizontally — including levels, objects, and animations.

Since it doesn't replace any geometry, so it should work with most custom levels and "romhacks" without issues.

Note that this mod only flips the camera controls if you're using the vanilla camera. If you're using a custom one (romhack camera, analog camera, mouse look), you might want to manually enable "Flip X axis" in your camera settings.

Also, shoutouts to ManIsCat for helping me fix some rendering issues!

narrator-mod-template.247.description:
This Mod is a template for other modders for a Narrator that talks over every action you do in game. For now, you have a basic narrator and a few audio files for certain actions. But you can add more to it. =D

Here is how you can do it:

Duplicate and change the following code's name and filename

Duplicate the following code and change the 
on_narrator#_action
 by changing the number up by 1. Then for every if then else that helps randomize the audio, add an end for the amount of audio you have. (EXAMPLE:

		Code:
	

        end
    end
    end
    end   --- 3 randomized audio files = 3 end marks
end   --- ends the end codes

)

Repeat the process with different m.action == actions. =)

No credit is needed to use the mods code and any questions can be asked in the comments.

Enjoy this mod. =D

no-bljs.110.title: No BLJs
no-bljs.110.author: Spring E. Thing
no-bljs.110.description:
Enabling this script as a mod when hosting a server for SM64-CoOp DX will prevent the famous 'Backwards Long Jump' glitch from being possible.

Server hosts have access to the chat command 
/no-blj
. Executing this chat command proving either an argument of 
on
 or 
off
 will 
enable
 or 
disable
 the mod respectively. By default, the mod is 
on
.

This script is an edit of an existing script by community member 'Sunk' who's script was intended to permit the BLJ glitch to be possible regardless of the properties of the surface Mario was performing the glitch upon. The script that I wrote for this addon pretty much just inverts the conditions and removes some unneccessary sections past this decision such that the one condition under which the BLJ glitch is possible in vanilla SM64 no longer exists.

no-button-challenge.749.author: SashaAnt
no-button-challenge.749.description: This is a small challenge mod I made which allows you to disable specific buttons for all players in the lobby. You can toggle disabled buttons in the mod menu (press menu and then right trigger). Enjoy!

no-hat-tricks.815.author: EmilyEmmi
no-hat-tricks.815.description: Prevents using the palette editor to become invincible by taking your cap on and off repeatedly. Since it requires standing still, it's most powerful in Tag and Drench Game (Lights Out).

no-one-under-eighteen-ageverificationmod.title: 🔞 AgeVerificationMod v1.1 🔞 [MOD-RELEASE]
no-one-under-eighteen-ageverificationmod.author: iZePlayz
no-one-under-eighteen-ageverificationmod.description:
Adds an very effective age-verification system to sm64ex-coop by testing the attention span of each player after joining. Every player needs to keep L,R,Z,A,B and D-Left or the corresponding keyboard buttons pressed (Keybindings) down (To prevent them doing something else with their hands in the meantime) for a random amount of seconds between 30s and 60s without a single frame interuption while also not moving to get verified. Any mistake will cause the timer to reset and restart​
 Now also the corresponding keyboard buttons/keybinds will work too (Check the settings in the main menu)​
​
Developed by iZePlayz​

noclip.30.author: AgentX
noclip.30.description: This is a mod that adds an improved ACT_DEBUG_FREE_MOVE with first person mode to the game. It's easily accessible by pressing Z + L. Hold down B to move slower and press L to exit Noclip.

these stars are not meant to be taken lightly!

obelix.572.title: Obelix
obelix.572.author: Aso-Designer
obelix.572.description:
Asterix's best and strong friend created by french comic artists Rene Goscinny and Albert Uderzo is now in Mario 64 as well!  

Assets are all from Mario 64, with custom textures and custom elements (like the belt and the helmet's top) done by me. 

Voices clips are also from few of the Asterix movies , most precisely the ones where Obelix was voiced by the late Pierre Tornade. (Asterix versus Caesar, Asterix In Britain, Asterix and the Big Fight, and Asterix conquers America).

Enjoy the mod as I enjoyed working on it!

Obelix (c) René Goscinny and Albert Uderzo

octagon.132.title: Octagon
octagon.132.author: Fearl
octagon.132.description:
Octagon
​
About:

• 6 Stars

• Single Level

odyssey-marios-moveset-rebirth.125.title: Odyssey Mario's Moveset: Rebirth
odyssey-marios-moveset-rebirth.125.author: PeachyPeach
odyssey-marios-moveset-rebirth.125.description:
A faithful recreation of sm64ex-omm for sm64coopdx!

Features:

Unique moves and gameplay from Odyssey, including Cappy.

Custom animations, star dances and death sequences!

True Non-Stop mode, designed to be able to collect all stars in one go.

Improved Power-ups:

Wing Cap: Inspired by Galaxy's Red Star, Mario can move freely in the air without height limitation.

Vanish Cap: Mario can walk through almost all thin walls and grids with ease.

Metal Cap: Mario becomes truly invincible. You won't sink in quicksand, you cannot die (unless you're already dead) and objects that try to squash Mario are destroyed.

A redesigned HUD to resemble Odyssey!

Display of each star in the current level, and which ones have and haven't been collected.

Radar that can point to the closest red coin/secret.

Fully custom camera!

Hold R while standing still to enter a new first person that lets you look in all directions.

You can toggle between 8 directional mode and 16 directions by tapping R.

Custom settings for different play styles. Type 
/omm
 in the game chat box to open the menu.

OMM Stars display that shows all levels and which stars have been collected per level, as well as unlocked caps and Bowser keys. Type 
/stars 
in the game chat box or by hold L when the game is paused to display.

Inbuilt support for various popular gamemodes.

Credits:

Author
: PeachyPeach

Contributors
: Isaac, Prince Frizzy, djoslin0, Altiami, Sharen (SMO animations)

only-up-64-flood-mod.964.title: Only Up 64 Flood Mod
only-up-64-flood-mod.964.author: DizzyThermal
only-up-64-flood-mod.964.description:
Only Up 64 Flood Mod (sm64coopdx)
​

Note: This is NOT the 
Only Up 64 Map
, this is Flood Mod for Only Up 64

Areas 1-8 on 
Hard Mode

What is Flood Mod?
​

Flood Mod is a game mode by Agent X - Climb to the top as the area floods!

Only Up 64 Flood Mod Trailer
​

coopdx-mods/mods/archived/flood at main · AgentXLP/coopdx-mods

Chat Commands
​

			/flood start [area] (a1-a8) - Start the round (optional: provide area)
		

Click to expand...

			/flood speed - Set the speed multiplier manually
		

Click to expand...

			/flood hardmode - Doubles the speed multiplier for all areas
		

Click to expand...

			/flood type [type] - Sets the flood type (water, lava, sand, mud, random)
		

Click to expand...

			/flood reset-all-points - Resets the scoreboard (all points)
		

Click to expand...

			/flood set-points [player-id] [points] - Sets a specified players points
		

Click to expand...

			/flood-scoreboard - Toggles the flood scoreboard
		

Click to expand...

​
Changes
​

Free-Cam Spectate -> Auto-Spectate

Known Issues
​

Final player spectates nothing on completion

New players may not warp to lobby

Credits
​

Agent X (Flood Mod v2.4) for original mod and permission to work on Flood for Only Up 64

All the testers helping me fix bugs and find good speeds for all the areas

only-up-64-plugin.962.title: Only Up 64 Plugin
only-up-64-plugin.962.author: DizzyThermal
only-up-64-plugin.962.description:
Only Up 64 Plugin (sm64coopdx)
​
This is NOT the 
Only Up 64 Map

Plugin Features
​
​
Warp System (Disabled by Default)
​

To 
enable the warp system
, the 
host
 or 
moderator
 must type: /ou64-warps

With warps enabled, type: /ou64-practice or use keybind: 
[X]

Toggle Height (Y-Coordinate) on HUD / Player list:
​

			/ou64-height - Toggles Character height on HUD and Player List.
		

Click to expand...

Ground Pound Twirl (A, Z, A)
​

Rollout after twirl is to not allow consecutive ground pound twirls

Ground Pound Jump (A, Z, A on ground)
​

Triple front flip animation instead of jump twirl

Ground Pound Dive (A, Z, B)
​

Wallslide
​

Allows wallslide from long jump

Instant-Turn
​

Allows for the player to make 180-degree turns when moving slow enough

Chat Commands
​

			/ou64-height - Toggles Character height on HUD and Player List
		

Click to expand...

			/ou64-meter - Toggles Height Meter
		

Click to expand...

			/ou64-moveset - Toggles Only Up 64 Moveset
		

Click to expand...

			/ou64-checkpoints - Toggles Checkpointing [Mod Only]
		

Click to expand...

			/ou64-warps - Toggles Warps [Mod Only]
		

Click to expand...

			/ou64-practice - Shows Warp Menu (Must be Enabled)
		

Click to expand...

			/ou64-run-timer - Toggles Run Timer
		

Click to expand...

			/ou64-leaderboard - Toggles Leaderboard
		

Click to expand...

​
Changes
​

Added Leaderboard and Run Timer

Added / Refactored Chat Commands

Added Checkpoints - modified to work in different areas (thanks djoslin0!)

Added exportable server metrics

Refactored a lot of the code

Added Warp Menu for Practice

Added Flood Mod Support

Added Area 8 and made the plugin compatible with all versions of Only Up 64

Added Debug Warp system from Only Up 64 Alpha testing to Only Up 64 Plugin (Default Off)

Being able to change directions when ground pound diving

Using the triple jump action for the ground pound jump (removed original ground pound jump)

Sparkles on frame-perfect dive rollouts, wallkicks, and speed kicks.

Less jank and higher gravity on the wall slide.

Merging changes from the Only Up 64 Alpha Tests

Decreased Ground Pound Twirl Y-Boost (42.0 -> 40.0)

Decreased Ground Pound Twirl Count (20 -> 10)

Allow Wallslide after Long Jump (Like Only Up 64)

Known Issues
​

Ground Pound Twirl ends in a ACT_FORWARD_ROLLOUT to make sure you cannot ground pound consecutively. This means Mario does a frontflip before entering free fall.

Credits
​

Ground Pound Jump, Ground Pound Dive, and Wallslide are from mods/extended-moveset.lua with some modifications

Moveset contributors: 
@steven3004

Checkpoints: 
@djoslin0

Recolored player heads: 
@EmilyEmmi

sm64coopdx technical help: @cooliokid956, 
@andre8739

Testing help: @retrodarkgamerx, @cooliokid956, @colbyrayz.z64

only-up-64.963.title: Only Up 64
only-up-64.963.author: DizzyThermal
only-up-64.963.description:
Only Up 64 (sm64coopdx)
​

About
​
Only Up 64
 is a romhack created by 
Kaze
 and 
thelegendofzenia

This whole mod is one big, tall level that takes around 25 minutes to complete - if you don't fall. Climb the biggest level ever made! (as of today)

You can use the GP dive and the GP spin to have an easier time in this game but difficult mode is doing it without them!

Mod Description
​
This mod is 
just
 the Only Up 64 map and original music.

Nothing else is required to feel the 
pain
, but if you want the moveset and more goodies, keep reading.

Only Up 64 Plugin
​
The 
Only Up 64 Plugin (sm64coopdx)
 provides the following features:

Only Up 64 Moveset:

Ground Pound Twirl (A, Z, A)

Ground Pound Jump (A, Z, A on ground)

Ground Pound Dive (A, Z, B)

Instant-Turn

Wallslide

Character Heights on HUD and Playerlist

Warp System

Leaderboard / Run Timer

Exportable Server Metrics (Used for 
Dizzy's Abyss
)

Playerlist

Server Start Time

Server Heartbeat

Please make sure all mods are on the latest version for the best experience!

​
Only Up 64 Flood Mod
​

Flood Mod Support
 for Only Up 64.

Flood Mod is a game mode by Agent X - Climb to the top as the area floods!

​
Chat Commands
​

			/ou64-music - Toggles Only Up 64 Original Soundtrack
		

Click to expand...

Known Issues​

Warps can rotate camera for non-free camera

Only Up 64 Map Blender File
​
This mod wouldn't be possible without Kaze releasing the Blender file for the map. Here is my modified one for sm64coopdx: 
Only Up 64 Blender File

The Blender map was recently optimized by going through each object and removing unused textures. The file size has been reduced from 
536.5 MB
 to 
186.4 MB
!

Only Up 64 Mario Blender File
​
The Mario model wouldn't be possible without Kaze. Thank you Kaze for permission to use it in this mod: 
Modified Mario Blender File

Thank you SonicTheHedgeHog64 (originally known as ThePerfectMario64) for post-processing the textures to work correctly.

Warning

Must use Blender 3.2+ with latest 
Fast64-Gart Edition
 - NOT mainline fast64 or legacy fast64-coop

Changes
​

Added Star Model from original ROM Hack (thanks ColbyRayz, Kaze)

Added Mario model from Only Up 64 ROM Hack (thanks SonicTheHedgeHog64)

Fixed some bugged textures (e.g., Vaporeon's eyes, Kakuna's eyes, Koopa flag, end Mario)

Made end Mario recolor off of sm64coopdx part colors (i.e., cap, glove, etc - thanks SonicTheHedgeHog64 for painfully helping with this)

Credits
​

Kaze
 and 
thelegendofzenia
 for creating the original ROM Hack and giving permission to port the ROM hack and use the custom Mario model.

Cooliokid956
 for helping with map backwarping, various other bits to make this all work, and dealing with my Python tendencies (nil not None!!).

SonicTheHedgeHog64
 for post-processing the textures to work correctly in the end Mario and helping me with recoloring the end Mario.

ColbyRayz
 for tracking down map issues (without warping!) to help identify bugged textures and for getting permission and providing the Only Up 64 star model.

Soundtrack
: 
MusicByAI - Only Up 64 OST: AI-Generated Chill Lofi Vibes
.

Special thanks to everyone else on the sm64coopdx Discord who helped with testing and debugging this mod to make Only Up 64 possible!

permadeath.1134.title: Permadeath
permadeath.1134.author: Dan_SM64
permadeath.1134.description:
For Coopnet Only!

(This doesn't work with Direct Connection.)

If a player dies, that player stays dead for the rest of the session!

If guests reconnect after dying, their death is remembered via their Coopnet ID.

You cannot exit course while midair or in a dying animation.

Reloading the server resets all deaths.

Use /deaths to see the list of dead players and the death count.

CREDITS:

Written by Dan

string_without_hex() function by birdekek

pet-mario-in-real-time-mario-head.505.title: [PET] Mario In Real Time (Mario Head)
pet-mario-in-real-time-mario-head.505.author: ThaGurlTIlly
pet-mario-in-real-time-mario-head.505.description:
Now you can play through Super Mario 64 with the iconic 
Mario Head
 by your side!

Mario In Real Time was a program developed by SimGraphics for Nintendo in 1991, it set the groundworks for the interactive Mario screens we see in Nintendo stores today!

Initially used for live shows like Spaceworld and E3, you may be more familiar with his infamous appearance in the game, 
Mario Teaches Typing 2.

years after the release of this game, the Youtube community got its hands on the FMV animations contained in the game, lovingly naming Mario In Real Time, "Mario Head." and he's been a staple of internet culture ever since.

Which brings us here!

Mario In Real Time is now in Mario 64 Co-op Deluxe, thanks to the wonderful WiddlePets mod!

sporting a brand new from scratch model, designed to fit with the limitations and art style of the original Super Mario 64

that's about it... download? 
​

pet-tiny-phalanx-deluxe-pack.551.title: [PET] Tiny Phalanx Deluxe Pack
pet-tiny-phalanx-deluxe-pack.551.author: Emeraldsniper
pet-tiny-phalanx-deluxe-pack.551.description:
Hey look, it's a ship! But wait.. it's, Tiny??

This is the Phalanx from the secret game Tiny Phalanx hidden away on another game called Zero Divide. This pack contains the following:

[PET] Tiny Phalanx

Phalanx (Koopa Shell)

Phalanx TP (K.S.)

The PET mod of this requires widdlepets to run. Contains two versions of the ship: 

Normal and Transparent Cockpit

Sounds are also from T.P. thanks to the PC port of ZD. The shell replacements follow the same line as the PET, having both versions for their own in their respective folders. (Folder bias may change in the future) The shell replacements can also be used as DynOS if you prefer by taking their bins and using it in the dynos/packs area. The shell replacements did have streamed music within it but due to the nature of the lua mod being buggy and destroying sounds outright sometimes, it was taken out until fixes can be made so where it's more consistent.

This mod will be updated in the future with more features as I progress my knowledge for coding and modeling. (Don't worry, I'm working on deathrun and the DL pack but those will take a long time to finish.. so have this mod in the meantime since this was planned long ago anyway..)Enjoy this pack! And uh... don't ask 
why
 a cat is the pilot of a long lost Legend. I don't know either.

prop-hunt.305.title: Prop Hunt
prop-hunt.305.author: Mr. Bushido
prop-hunt.305.description:
This game mode adds prop hunt to Mario 64. Start the round by pressing L + R + A when at least 2+ players are in the arena. Press left/right on the D-Pad to change map as the host.

This is still in development, as I still have a lot of features (and bug fixes) planned.

Some ideas I have planned are:

"Smart Mode" and "Frantic Mode" for choosing how the props are randomly selected.

Open world mode so that the entire game is the map.

Enemies and NPC's as props.

Please report any bugs or ideas in this thread!

Be extremely subtle, even to the point of formlessness. - Sun Tzu
