proximity-chat.200.title: Proximity Chat
proximity-chat.200.author: Drenchy
proximity-chat.200.description:
Proximity chat in mario 64 coop is finally here! It does exactly what the title says.

This mod works with an external program to function. The host needs the lua file in order to host a lobby.

THIS DOES NOT WORK WITH MOBILE AND WILL NEVER HAVE MOBILE SUPPORT

Join the coop lobby before joining the prox chat or your name won't show!

use /setdistance [multiplyer] to modify how far away you want the proximity voice to be.

This mod was a bounty from Drenchy that was picked up by Limbokong.

Huge thanks to Yuyake for the renders used in the app!

THIS MOD WAS MADE FOR DRENCHY'S YOUTUBE CHANNEL! IF YOU ARE MAKING A VIDEO ON THIS MOD PLEASE LINK DRENCHY IN THE DESCRIPTION 

DOWNLOAD THE APP HERE:

						Mario 64 Proximity Voicechat 1.2.zip
					

					drive.google.com
				

Prox chat trailer:

HOW TO SET UP:

						How to set up proximity chat in mario 64 coop
					

This guide will show you how to set up proximity chat in mario 64 coop!The first thing you’ll need is mario 64 coop dx found at this website https://sm64coopdx.com/   *I won’t be going over how to install coop dx*  Next you will need to download BOTH the proximity application and lua mod. YES ...

					docs.google.com
				

Trouble Shooting Guide

						Proximity Chat Trouble Shooting
					

This guide will go over troubleshooting if there are any issues with the Proximity chat voice mod! Known issues: Names not appearing  -If names are not appearing when joining a proximity voice chat lobby there is most likely an issue on the host’s end -The host MUST be also using the lua mod and...

					docs.google.com
				

Drenchy's Discord server

						Join the The Drenches Discord Server!
					

Check out the The Drenches community on Discord - hang out with 1381 other members and enjoy free voice and text chat.

					discord.gg
				

Prox Chat support discord server

						Join the SM64 Proximity Voicechat Discord Server!
					

Check out the SM64 Proximity Voicechat community on Discord - hang out with 199 other members and enjoy free voice and text chat.

					discord.gg

rd-notification-message.937.title: Rd Notification Message
rd-notification-message.937.author: _rd64_
rd-notification-message.937.description:
RD NOTIFY MESSAGE

Requires sm64coopdx v1.4 or above

What's this mod?

Create custom visual notifications on screen to communicate with your friends during multiplayer. Perfect for announcing events, giving instructions, or just leaving funny messages.

See commands here:

Permanent Alerts: 
/rdt [message] 
(stays on screen)

Timed Alerts: 
/rdt5, /rdt10, /rdt15, /rdt20, /rdt30
 (seconds)

Color Customization: 
/rdc [color]
 (Includes Mario_Red, Luigi_Green, Rainbow, etc.)

Visual Effects: Toggle movement 
(/rdn)
 and glow 
(/rdb)

Logic: Movement ON + Glow O

N = Pulsing text; Movement OFF = Static text

Auto-wrapping for long messages

Host-only permissions for command usage

Open Chat, Type 
/rdt [message] 
to start (
Host only
) or 
/rdt
 to remove message.

Changelog 1.0.1

Major Improvements Complete refactor

Performance optimization

Rendering system optimized

and more

You're all set! thanks to Djoslin0 for Lib source

rideable-yoshi.288.title: Rideable Yoshi
rideable-yoshi.288.author: steven3004
rideable-yoshi.288.description:
This mod adds rideable Yoshies to the game in some levels.

When you ride a Yoshi, you can travel a little faster and flutter jump across gaps. You can also get inifinite flutter jumping with a wing cap.

Unfortunately, right now, Yoshies can't eat enemies, and neither can you ride one underwater.

Yoshies will also use the color palette of whoever rides them, and can share the rider's Metal Cap. Though they can't have the Vanish Cap yet.

This mod also comes with two commands:

/YOSHI_DEBUG [on|off|host-only]
Toggles a debug mode where ya can spawn stuff from the mod with a D-Pad:

D-Pad Up: Yoshi Egg

D-Pad Right: Yoshi Nest

D-Pad Down: Yoshi

/yoshi-model [on|off]
 Toggle between the models in the mod, and the in-game vanilla model.

This mod also has a mini API that can place spawn nests around levels in ROM hacks (and only in ROM hacks for now).

(Example will be uploaded later.)

set-checkpoints.569.description:

sharens-animation-overhaul.262.title: Sharen's Animation Overhaul
sharens-animation-overhaul.262.author: Sharen64
sharens-animation-overhaul.262.description:
Since I'll be out of my home for a few days and be unable to work on anything, I decided to give you all a small sample of what I've been working on.

This mod changes a bunch of Mario's animations to give the game a bit of a different feel, as well as make a couple of extra changes to him
 
(which may or may not end up transforming this into a Sharen's Details DX but I do not promise anything).

So far: 
Idle, First Person, Walking, Running, Halting, Turning around, all 3 basic jumps, Freefall, Sideflip, Backflip, both Long Jumps, Wall Jump
 (with a new firstie animation!), 
all of the respective jumps' Landing animations, Crouching, Uncrouching
 and 
Crawling
 have been re-animated.

Also makes Mario open his hands on a couple of animations, makes him look around when strafing in the air, and makes heavy use of the unused eye states.

All of these can be toggled in the options menu.

sharens-improved-swimming.241.title: Sharen's Improved Swimming
sharens-improved-swimming.241.author: Ex Coop Mods Archive
sharens-improved-swimming.241.description:
Sharen's Improved Swimming

List of changes:

- Instead of rotating Mario to the desired direction and pressing A at a specific rhythm, you now simply pull the stick to where you wanna go and Mario will simply go there, with no need to mash A as he'll stroke on his own, if you wish to go up or down, just hold A or Z.

- Entering water no longer puts you in a state where you have to wait for Mario to stop moving downwards, instead, you get to control him right away! In addition, if you enter water while already having considerable speed (most commonly via dives or long jumps) you'll get to keep extra speed you'd normally never reach!

- Shells are no longer a stupid joke, their duration was buffed from 8 seconds (yeah I didn't believe it either) to 30, alongside making you swim significantly faster as well as letting you halt to a complete stop faster! Oh yeah, you can also carry them out of the water if you wish, not sure how that's gonna be useful though.

- Metal Mario CAN swim now! You still sink, though, and swimming upwards will be noticeably slower, but hey, at least you get to swim downwards really fast.

- Water grabbing now doubles as a dash, very useful if you haven't entered water the proper way (a.k.a diving) or lost speed, though I wouldn't recommend using it if you did dive, as you'll lose your extra speed

If for some reason you wish to stick to the old way, you can! Simply type 
/better-swim
 and that will toggle the mod on or off.

Your browser is not able to display this video.

shotgun-coop.621.title: Shotgun Coop
shotgun-coop.621.author: ProfeJavix
shotgun-coop.621.description:
This mod gives every player a shotgun with a moveset.
​

Moves:

Y: Shoot

Charged Y (hold until the bar is charged): Boost Shoot

Ground Pound + Y: Ground Pound Shoot

Ground Pound + Charged Y: Boost Ground Pound Shoot

X: Toggle First Person

You can use the shotgun either in PvP or with some game objects/enemies, the choice is yours (tip: each move deals different damage, so not all of them will have an effect on some targets). 

Check Mod Menu to set the reload time and the boost charge time. Also, if you load EmilyEmmi's MarioHunt, the host will have the chat command "/sgcoop-mhteam" to select which team will have the shotguns. Allowed values are:
​

"0" or "hunters" ( default)

"1" or "runners"

"2" or "both"

Credits to Agent X's 
Gun Mod
 for the PvP inspiration and Dorrieal's 
Shotgun Mario
 romhack for the original shotgun concept.

This mod was a bounty from Drenchy. Visit his channel!

sm64-chaos-edition.490.title: SM64 Chaos Edition
sm64-chaos-edition.490.author: ManIsCat2
sm64-chaos-edition.490.description:
Super Mario 64, but random codes are injected into the game at random intervals, resulting in an experience that can only be described as chaotic.

Epilepsy Warning:

This mod contains flashing lights or patterns that may trigger seizures in individuals with photosensitive epilepsy. Viewer discretion is advised.

Original Mod Author: Kaze Emanuar

Coop Mod Author: ManIsCat2

Not all the codes (effects) could be ported for coop because of limitations so some are missing. I am deeply sorry!

This mod has a mod menu, the host can modify the Chaoticness and the Chaos Timer, here's what they do:

    - Chaoticness: Max amount of codes (effects) that can be active at once.

    - Chaos Timer: The time between code activation (seconds).

Some info about the mod:

    - Do not report any Bugs to Mods or the actual game while playing this Mod!!!

    - Also remember that this mod can cause lag!!!

    - in this mod, the object effects only sync if the player that has activated the effect and you, are in the same level.

    - If you experience Script Errors, ping me in Coop Central or DM me in Discord. (username is maniscat2)

sm64coopdx-manager.510.title: SM64CoopDX Manager
sm64coopdx-manager.510.author: Squishy6094
sm64coopdx-manager.510.description:
SM64CoopDX Manager

A tool made for managing SM64CoopDX and it's mods

How to use:

SM64CoopDX Manager attempts to be as user friendly as possible for a console-based manager, but there are some caviates...

Getting Dependancies:

System
 - Must be installed on your machine manually in order to use basic Python functionality

Python
 - The language SM64CoopDX Manager is built in

pip
 - Package installer for Python

Python Libraries
 - Must be installed in order to use SM64CoopDX Manager, if pip is installed you can use these commands in your terminal of choice to download them manually.

requests
 - 
python -m pip install requests

chime
 - 
python -m pip install chime

watchdog
 - 
python -m pip install watchdog

Starting the program:

After installing all of the required dependancies, you should be able to launch the python file in the same way you would an executible file. Once starting, it will attempt to download the Python Libraries above automatically if you haven't already, then you will boot into the Manager Menu!

Goals:

1. (Achieved) A User-Friendly console-based mod organizer made to improve Loading / Mod Cache times

2. (Future Update) An Automatic SM64CoopDX Update Notifier and Installer

Current Functionality:

1. Mod Organization

2. Mass Mod Loading / Unloading

3. Automatic Mod Backups

4. Improved Mod Caching Times (Dependant on Mods loaded)

5. Booting SM64CoopDX from Launcher

6. Automatic Python Package Instalation

Planned Functionality:

1. Automatic SM64CoopDX Update Installation

2. (?) Automatic Mod Update Installation

3. (?) DynOS Organization

4. (?) SM64CoopDX Config Editor/Option Menu

sonic-character-rebooted.13.title: Sonic Character: Rebooted
sonic-character-rebooted.13.author: steven3004
sonic-character-rebooted.13.description:
This is a mod that adds Sonic and friends as a playable character in sm64ex-coop.

This mod can be used two ways:

As a Character Select pack: Adds two characters with movesets and palettes to the CS menu.

As a standalone mod: Type /sonic in chat to turn on Sonic characters. Each character overwrites a vanilla character's slot, the list goes:

Mario: Sonic

Luigi: ?

Toad: Amy Rose

Waluigi: ?

Wario: ?

Sonic replaces Mario, and is faster than the vanilla cast, and he also brings some new tricks to the table.

Momentum tweaks: When running or landing Sonic doesn't lose any speed that he has gained. If you let go of the analog stick he'll decelerate instead of stopping immediately.

Air control: While airborne, during some moves, he can turn around in the air and change directions.

No swimming. He instead has a limited version of his ground moveset.

Fall damage is delayed a bit for Sonic.

B button (ground):

Spindash: Hold the B button to charge the spindash, and let go to dash off rollin'. Ya can also spam it and gain some speed, but it's capped.

Sonic Eagle: Hold A and press B and he'll do the Sonic Eagle from Sonic Battle, which is basically a reskinned Jump Kick here.

Windmill Kick: This move replaces Mario's slide kick. By pressng B while crouch-slidin', Sonic will do a spinning kick, attacking most enemies and bouncin' off walls.

B button (air):

Sonic Eagle: Basically the same move, but ya have to let go of the analog stick t' do it.

Dropdash: Hold B in the air with the analog stick and you'll start a dropdash. If ya hold it until you hit the ground, you'll get more speed and start rollin'. If ya release it in the air, you'll instead perform an airdash. If ya hold it until ya hit a wall, you'll climb upwards. The faster you are, the higher you'll jump up.

Bound Jump: Sonic's replacement fer the ground pound. Press Z and you'll bounce on the ground, break stuff, and be immune t' fall damage. Though keep in mind that you'll have less air control.

Grabbing: Just spindash or roll into an object.

Amy goes over Toad, is mostly similar to Sonic in terms of physics, but she has moves of her own that makes for a different play style.

(Her voice clips are mostly unfinished for now.)

Passive abilities:

1. Amy's jump height is much higher than Sonic's and most of the vanilla cast.

2. She can swim, unlike Sonic, but instead of a breaststroke, she only has a flutter kick, and her speed increases the same way it does on land

Giant Steps:

1. This move replaces the Long Jump, in which Amy leaps forward in the held direction, allowing her to gain speed and redirect momentum immediately while on the ground.

2.  Keep in mind that this move doesn't have air mobility and there is a bit of delay for using the move.

    + By pressing B during the move, she will trip over and do what's basically just a reskinned dive.

Hammer Attack: The most basic melee move. You press B on the ground and she'll whack her hammer instead of punching or kicking.

Hammer Twirl: By crouching and holding B, Amy will spin with her hammer and bounce off walls. You're able to change your direction by a bit during this move if yer moving, and it slows you down when you're on the ground.

Hammer Flip:

1. While Amy's in the air, if you press or hold B, she'll spin forwards with her hammer.

2. While the move is being done, she can bounce up walls, retaining some speed and gaining height based on the speed. Note that ya gotta be fully and constantly spinning fer this to be possible. Run into a wall too early and she'll just bonk off of it.

Hammer Jump: When ya press A within a few frames of her hitting her hammer, either from a Hammer Attack or landing with a Hammer Flip, she'll propel upwards. The height you gain depends on how fast you go. This is also how ya fly with the Wing Cap.

Hammer Pound:

1. This is basically just a simple replacement fer the Ground Pound where she spins her hammer downwards.

2. If you press and hold B during the move, she'll thrust forwards a bit and do the Hammer Twirl.

In addition, here's the intended color code fer this model:

Sonic:

Shirt/Cap (Shoes): d91101

Overalls (Quills): 4084d9

Skin: fdc976

Gloves: ffffff

Amy:

Shirt/Cap (Clothes): e41515

Overalls (Secondary Clothes): 00ff86

Hair (Quills): fd90a7

Skin: ffb597

Gloves: ffffff

Credits:

Coding, Modelling and Animating: 
steven.

Ball model: 
king the memer

Sound Effects: 
SEGA - Sonic Team

Sonic VA and Animation Helper: 
AngelicMiracles

Amy Rose VA: Grimoria Webb

Custom voice system: SMS Alfredo

Coolest playtesters:  Asra, Matheus Lopes, Great Kingdom Official, DemnyxOnyxfur, Zerks

Song used in the trailer.

sonic-health.115.title: Sonic health
sonic-health.115.author: wereyoshi
sonic-health.115.description:
on hit drop rings equal to the rings counter if you get hit with no rings or shield you die

coins no longer heal (since rings normally don't give air) and recovery hearts can now give a shield (can be toggled off using /recoveryheartshield command basically i made recovery hearts act as a shield monitor)

has generic super forms no stat changes only invincibility and hurt enemies on touch activated by pressing x (by default can be changed with sonichealthsuperbutton command) and having 50 rings + prereq(default 50 stars)

Spoiler: 
screenshots

Spoiler: 
commands

/decreasecoincounter - [on|off] turn decreasecoincounter on or off to choose whether to decrease the coin counter on hit and rings equal 1 coin or have the coin counter not decease on hit and rings only affect ring counter

/loseringsonlevelchange - turn loseringsonlevelchange on or off to choose if you want to keep your rings between levels.

/maxrecollectablerings - maxrecollectablerings [number] this sets the maximum amount of rings you can get back per hit

/maxringloss [number] this sets the max number of rings you can lose at once set it to 0 to always lose all rings.

/recoveryheartshield = [on|off] turn recoveryheartshield on or  off to choose whether recovery hearts should give an  overshield on touch.

/ringscrushinstadeath - [on|off] turn ringscrushinstadeath on or off to choose if you want being crushed to be instadeath.

/ringui_x - ringui_x [number|dpad|toggleui] this sets the x position of the ring counter should be a value  between 0 and 320, ringui_x \\#A02200\\dpad\\#ffffff\\ for moving the ui with dpad,or ringui_x toggleui to toggle the ui

/ringui_y - ringui_y [number|dpad|toggleui] this sets the y position of the ring counter should be a value between 0 and  -240, ringui_y \\#A02200\\dpad\\#ffffff\\ for moving the ui with dpad,or ringui_y toggleui to toggle the ui

/sonicfalldamage - [on|off] turn sonicfalldamage on or off to choose whether you can take fall damage

/sonichealthconfig = [save|load|savesuperpreqpref|loadsuperpreqpref|printserver|printlocal] to save the current sonic health settings to a file or load them (loading only works if used by a moderator or the server)

/sonichealthsuperbutton - [reset|change] set the button/buttons to turn super, reset sets it back to default(default x) and change allows you to change it

/sonicsuper - [on|off|prereq|7coinstar|number] toggle the ability to go super with 50+ rings + requirement, get the requirement by typing prereq ,change prereq by entering number of stars needed or entering 7coinstar to make super require 7 100 coin stars.

/disablelavabounce', [on|off] turn disablelavabounce \\#00C7FF\\on \\#ffffff\\or \\#A02200\\off \\#ffffff\\to choose if you want to lava bounce on lava.

so you can do /maxringloss 0  and /maxrecollectablerings 20 to lose all rings on hit but only be able to recover 20 of them.

this mod also contains an api that other mods can use _G.sonichealth

Spoiler: 
sonichealth api

customsupercheck --function to allow another mod to pass its own super prereq check for if a romhack wants to set a specific super requirement

supermoveset--function to store super toggles for other mods with the functions having false for off and true for this mod to toggle which allows other mods such as movesets to act differently when super

getringcount --this function allows other mods to check ringcount

increaseringcount --this function allows other mods to modify ringcount

getversion --this function returns the sonic health version

addallycheck --expects the function to have parameters customfunc(attacker,victim) param victim mariostate of the player being attacked and param attacker mariostate of the player attacking and the function should return 1 (when the hit player is an ally and you don't want the player to affect their ally),return 2 (when the hit player is an ally and you want the interaction to happen without ring loss), and return 0 otherwise(which causes the hit player to lose rings on hit).

get_serversetting -- function that returns the value of a gGlobalSyncTable variable or variables used by sonichealth mod

getshield --this function allows other mods to check the player's shield

giveshield ----this function allows other mods to give/take away a shield

addcustomenemyfunction --this function allows other mods to have custom interactions

isplayersuper --this function returns whether a player is super

deprecated 
addsuperenemyfunction--this function allows other mod's objects to have unique interactions with super forms
 use addcustomenemyfunction instead

credits

steven3004
- making rings fling out of your position instead of spawning around your position

speedrun-timer-reworked.222.title: Speedrun Timer Reworked
speedrun-timer-reworked.222.author: JairoThePlumber
speedrun-timer-reworked.222.description:

sprays.813.title: Sprays

sprays.813.description:
Your browser is not able to display this video.

SPRAYS:

Spray with dpad_down to graffiti all over any eligible wall!

mario version of jet set radio sfx to accompany the tagging

default spray is [character]: it will conform to your lives icon, it's compatible with Character Select and will conform to custom lives icon used in that as well!

a few other basegame sprays as well (including my good friend Finn (i trapped him in the sprays))

you can even Personalize your Copy of the spray mod by adding your own sprays! API included with the mod can add sprays you put in the textures folder (you'll have to add a few lines of code to get it in game, there's an example file included to show you what you have to do)

don't go posting low-effort spray packs here though lol

spotifycoopdx-custom-voicelines.817.title: SpotifyCoopDX & Custom Voicelines
spotifycoopdx-custom-voicelines.817.author: kikwee
spotifycoopdx-custom-voicelines.817.description:
THIS IS A 2 PART MOD READ EVERYTHING TO UNDERSTAND!!!

SpotifyCoopDX:

Bring your spotify playlist to sm64coopdx! add your .mp3 files to the sound folder and add the

file path, song name, artist name, and length of the song in the "add-songs.lua" file. (the limit of of megabytes (MB) of songs is maxed at 35 MB combined (no i cannot change this if u have a problem with it ask the sm64coopdx developers))

Commands:

/pause pause a song

/unpause unpause a song

/restart restart the playing song

/skipto (song ID) skip to a song

/skipmany (number) skip a multiple number of songs

/skip skip song

/playlist shows list of songs in your playlist

/song shows song info

Custom Voicelines:

YOU CAN NOW ADD CUSTOM VOICELINES TO SM64COOPDX IN THE EAISEST WAY POSSIBLE!!! Add your .ogg file in the sound folder and add your .ogg file in the "add-voicelines.ogg" (example: [CHAR_SOUND_OKEY_DOKEY] = 'your voiceline.ogg',).

ITS AS EASY AS IT GETS YOU CAN'T MESS UP (but if you do just message me)

standard-kart-ds-collection.134.title: Standard Kart DS Collection
standard-kart-ds-collection.134.author: [Viande Scolopendragon]
standard-kart-ds-collection.134.description:
This mod is a collection of standard karts of all playable characters of Mario Kart DS game, with some new karts of characters not seen before in Mario Kart DS (Toadette, Rosalina, Pauline, Dry Bowser etc).

/kartconf - with this command you can modify everyone's karts with different modifiers - only the host can use this command.

These modifications are:

Number of coins  

Speed 

MKDS Speed 

Kart Collision

Green Shell shooter 

AutoJump 

/karts - this command allows you to choose between the different karts available.

Developed by: Birdekek, Jzzle, Viandegrasacarnechuleta

HUD Menu based in ANTONBLAST by Sharen

Drift is not yet available, we will eventually add it.

star-choose-exit.442.title: Star Choose Exit
star-choose-exit.442.author: king the memer
star-choose-exit.442.description:
i remember a while back seeing a few people who

wanted the option to choose whether to stay or leave

on the star get screen while using the "Stay In Level"

server option so i thought id try making it myself

its an extremely simple mod, instead of asking if

you want to save it asks if you want to stay in the

level or not saying no will trigger a star exit rather

than a regular death exit

, considering it hack is even worse than original SR1 at this point.

Anyway, this hack is in the trio of questionable SRs (together with Night of Doom and SR4). Given the name, this remade all levels from SR1, fixing some of it's problems while creating new ones in return. Also has 1 new level and dropping the vanish cap level.

Original game by BroDute with 106 Stars. Version 2.x versions by LinCrash with 111 Stars.

Story: Funny stars mess with some part of Mushroom People Land, crazy stuff, do NOT play.

This hack got replaced by

Star Takeover Redone
​
About:

125 Stars

Remade and Reimagined Levels

Star Revenge Series

Star Check Support

This is a modern remake of Star Revenge 1 ST with 125 stars, which is also the 2nd time SR1 got remade.

(Older versions before v2.1 only got 121 stars)

Most of the levels are direct edits of the old models or full re-imagines of the levels from SR1. The levels itself are held to classic style.

Versions 2.1 and 2.2 each replace some of the existing levels with even more updated versions, so there will be sometimes a drop in quality, considering not all levels have been given a touch-up yet.

star-revenge-2-night-of-doom.80.title: Star Revenge 2: Night of Doom
star-revenge-2-night-of-doom.80.author: Ex Coop Mods Archive
star-revenge-2-night-of-doom.80.description:
Original Post: November 15, 2022

Author: BlackJoyStick

If you enjoy romhacks that abuse game mechanics such as quicksand, lava, fire spitters or chuckyas, then say no more! This is the second romhack of the Star Revenge Series, now ported to sm64ex-coop. You really should not play this but it’ll be fun to see you try.

Contains 160 stars. If you find any bugs (if you even get to see them) notify me first.

Original romhack author: BroDute

Editor Note: This Rom Hack has undergone several revisions since its first post.  This is the most up-to-date known release.  A full changelog can be found below.

Spoiler: 
Full Changelog

Star Revenge 2 Quick Bugfix
-Fixed an issue where the first star in course 1 would be impossible to get

Just like with the first one, here's a rework update for Star Revenge 2: Night of Doom.-All Levels now have better looking fog-Added custom music for Koopa the Quick's Race-Added Custom Power Meter-Added (most) Custom Exclamation Boxes! thanks to @Agent X's script, the king bob omb one still doesn't work very well-Potentially fixed an issue with the names of some levelsThis should be more better looking now, if you are able to get past the HUB that is 

Just like with 0.5 I tweaked Star Revenge 2 just a bit.-Fixed Flame Colours-Bowser 3 Now has its custom texturesthose two details were bugging me off

Changed some important stuff and fixed a serious bug i hadn't seen before.-Fixed a collision bug in Space Memories-Disabled Star Get Milestones-Added Cannon Lid Texture-Added Custom Hud-Added King Bob Omb Exclamation Box-Fixed Overworld Red Coin Boxes-Reduced Requirements for Red Coin Stars-Added Infinite Lives, 1UP mushrooms heal you instead.Have fun and so on

-Fixed an Issue in Night of Doom where King Bob Omb would give the wrong star

About:

Star Revenge Series
​

This is Star Revenge 7.5, a SMG2 green stars styled hack based on Star Revenge 7.

Unlike SR6.5, this hack features all levels from the hack it's based one, fully edited and with some level themes fully changed.

It being based on SR7, means the 5 badges are back to unlock Triple Jumps, Walljump, the 2 Blocks and the lava defense increase on full health.

This hack is a lot harder than other Star Revenges, specially compared to SR7 itself. Star 6 and 7 in each level are locked behind cap switches as well, leading to a bit more backtracking, depending on how you go about it.

Story: After the failed attempt to stop Timerock, Kedowser was brought back and causes a lot of chaos in the Part and it's surroundings.

star-revenge-7-park-of-time.144.description:
Star Revenge 7:
 
Park of
 
Time
​

About:

• 121 Stars

• Badges

• New Levels

• Star Revenge Series

You enter a park, split into 3 sections based on water, the sky and various other environments.

Upon entering Mario looses his ability to perform triple jumps and walljumps + his path is blocked by Blocks similar to stone and metal blocks from Paper Mario.

​

About:

121 stars

Open world

Levels themed around various locations of the Touhou Project series

Star Revenge series

This is Star Revenge 8, a full-size hack featuring a world of interconnected levels and branching paths, all based on Touhou Project. Collect stars, cap switches, and returning badges from Star Revenge 7 in order to traverse Gensokyo and the realms that connect to it.

Story:
 After the events of Star Revenge 7.5, the Earth was hopelessly pulverized, and the mysterious big star Scriosadh has taken hold of the Scepter of Faith lingering in the planet's remains, shaping the world into it's image: a dark void.

Now, Mario, after being brought back from the dead by mistake, must explore the still-intact Gensokyo in search of stars to defeat Scriosadh and recharge the Scepter to reshape the Earth once more; either for better or for worse.

Other notes:

Navigation map included inside the zip.

This port uses v1.4.3 of the romhack.

Music sequences, instead, are ported from the v1.0, since the sequences featured in the newest versions utilize custom soundbanks, an impossible task for SM64CoopDx yet.

By default, the jingles for both collecting a star and the following hi-score play instead a full, looping music track. You can change this back to a simple, modern jingle by using the comand 
/newJingle [on/off]
.

With the command 
/sr8mode [pointdevice/legacy] or [0/1]
 you can change between two gamemodes. Pointdevice mode is the default, with infinite lives, 1ups are replaced with full heal items and there is no fall damage. Legacy mode changes it back to traditional lives and fall damage.

This romhack, among it's levels, features 2 challenging extra stages. They can only be accessed after inputing a password in a room near of the starting point of the hack. Where is this password? You can find it by either playing Star Revenge 6.9 or defeating the final boss of this hack.

This hack will not work properly in versions of SM64CoopDx below v1.3 (preferably the latest, scrolling textures were re-broken until 1.3.1!).

There was an attempt at reimplementing jukeboxes back from the More Objects Patch.

Commands:
​

scb-chain [number or name] - Chain yourself to a group by its number or to the group where a player is (Default is Group 0)

scb-unchain - Unchain yourself.

scb-spectate - Spectate your chain group.

Be sure to check the mod menu options to customize your experience.

super-mario-128.619.title: Super Mario 128
super-mario-128.619.author: jonathanoflebones
super-mario-128.619.description:
We both thought the same, but nope, it's not the gamecube tech demo! This is an old piece

of romhacking history.
 
Super Mario 128 is a ROM hack created by RJWaters2, and released in 2008. It is one of the oldest SM64 ROM hacks which uses modified levels from the original game, and was highly known for its extreme puzzle-platforming difficulty level. 

The hack was sadly discontinued, only leaving this 16 Star demo, however, there's extra levels that were modified which you can access, bringing up the total to 52 possible stars.

super-mario-64-2.1117.title: Super Mario 64(2)
super-mario-64-2.1117.author: jonathanoflebones
super-mario-64-2.1117.description:
Super Mario 64(2) is a hack created by FeYoshiParty that was made in Toad's Tool 64 back in 2007, making it one of the first and oldest hacks ever created. 

This hack was claimed to be lost for a very long time with footage seen only in youtube videos from the creator's channel, then a working build of the hack was uploaded to the Internet Archive in 2023. Which I later reuploaded to Romhacking.com with a patch fixing a few game breaking bugs made by myself, and now the hack has been ported to coop using that same patch.

The hack has 121 stars total. (122 if you can get the second star in Dire Dire Docks), it features retextured levels, edited object layouts, and this port also overrides the 5 Main Character palettes, changing them into a Fire Flower outfit seen in the original hack (thanks 
birdekek
, for the help)

Have fun playing through a piece of romhacking history!

super-mario-the-galactic-journey.215.author: Dragonary
super-mario-the-galactic-journey.215.description:
Super Mario The Galactic Journey

Romhack created by Fares242

Ported to co-op by Dragonary

Story​
There exists a Star of great power placed in its altar in the center of the universe. It is called the "Galactic Star". It balances the spatial activity especially for planets with life on them. Bowser steals the Galactic Star for his desire for an intergalactic empire. A Luma comes and request Mario's help from the Toads and builds a Starship for them that is powered on Silver Stars. Unfortunately, Silver Stars zoom out as a result of the Galactic Star's absence. One of the Toads manages to catch one Silver Star before it zoomed away which was enough to start the journey with the Starship. Silver Stars have spread around from all around space, and Mario's quest is to collect them, power up the engine of the Starship to go as far as it can before Mario would resume his galactic adventure on foot.

Features​

			102 Stars across 23 worlds (side levels and hub worlds included)
		

Click to expand...

			Custom music from various games
		

Click to expand...

			Fall damage DISABLED
		

Click to expand...

			No 100 coin stars
		

Click to expand...

super-smash-bros-co-op.253.title: Super Smash Bros. Co-op
super-smash-bros-co-op.253.author: Keeberghrh
super-smash-bros-co-op.253.description:
Super Smash Bros. Co-op v0.1​
After two months, this mod is being released! 

As a quick warning: Larger player counts may break the game.

It is recommended you stick to smaller groups, between 2 and 5 players.

The mod works with more players, but game breaking bugs seem more common with higher player counts.

Features​
10 fighters!
 5 Additional Characters

Mario - Basic fighter, closest to vanilla movement.

Luigi - Similar to Mario, but with different aerials.

Toad - Fast and powerful attacks.

Waluigi - Has attacks that can combo fairly well.

Wario - Heavy hitter, but slow on the ground.

New Characters

Bowser - Powerful attacks, fire breath and heavier than most fighters. (Model by 
@wibblus
, thank you 
)Kirby - Has Inhale as a Special to copy your opponent's Special.

King Bob-omb - Can throw Bob-ombs which deal a lot of damage. Very heavy and large hurtbox.

Sonic - Fastest fighter, but slightly weaker.

Emerl - Can copy all characters! By pressing DPAD UP, Emerl enters a menu where any individual attack can be chosen and swapped out. Saves to mod storage.

Three Gamemodes!

Smash Mode - Regular Smash, dealing damage increases your opponent's %!

Stamina Mode - Instead of %, damage simply lowers your opponent's HP.

Boss Mode - The Host selects one player to be the Boss. The Boss has heavy armour, takes reduced knockback, a health bar, and can be resized to be larger or smaller. Non-Boss Players have to work to defeat the boss!

		Code:
	

Grounded + B + Idle    = Jab
Grounded + B + Running = Dash Attack
Grounded + B + Crouch  = Special
Aerial + B             = Aerial
Ground Pound + A       = Recovery
Ground Pound + B       = Ground Pound Dive

Enjoy!

tag.29.title: Tag
tag.29.author: EmeraldLockdown
tag.29.description:
Tag

This mod is a collection of multiple gamemodes all in one mod! The mod contains 9 gamemodes, modifiers that effect the gameplay of the gamemode, in-depth, easy to understand settings, and statistics!

Gamemodes

Tag contains multiple tag-related gamemodes! All gamemodes involve "tagging" another player. There are as of right now 9 different gamemodes. These gamemodes are Tag, Freeze Tag, Infection, Hot Potato, Juggernaut (meh), Assassins, Sardines, Hunt, and Deathmatch! Each gamemode gives it's own fun to the mod!

Modifiers

There are plenty of modifiers to add variety your game! From simple gravity changes to blasters and fog, modifiers add plenty of enjoyable (or annoying) changes to the base gamemodes!

Romhacks

Romhack support depends on the romhack. Offical romhacks have paintings, and pipes like vanilla levels! Non-official romhacks don't have these benefits, however, the romhack should still work perfectly fine!

Arena Stage

Arena Stages are fully supported, with pipes and all! It is highly recommended to play with arena stages. Downside is you don't get paintings.

Official Tag Stages

Tag Stages include paintings and custom-placed pipes, these are perfect mods to add to your tag experience!

Blacklists

Don't like a gamemode, modifier, or level? Blacklist it! Blacklisting allows you to turn off certain gamemods, modifiers, or levels that you don't like in your game.

Stats

Each player has stats! These stats go from playtime, total tags, and total time as runner, to total runner victories and tagger victories. The best part is each gamemode gets it's own statistics for each of these metrics!

Frequently Asked Questions

sm64ex-coop/sm64coopdx Support:

This mod supports both repos. If you encounter a bug with a specific one, make an issue 
here
 so it can be addressed.

Romhack Compatibility:

Yes, Tag supports romhacks. You can add paintings and more to romhacks by creating what's called an official hack (wow great name!). You can learn how to do that 
here
. The mod also includes a blacklist to remove incompatible levels.

Code Usage:

Generally, you can use code from this mod for your own projects. Credit is not required, but ensure you understand the code and avoid copying large portions without modification.

Custom Versions:

You're welcome to publish custom versions of this mod. However, consider contributing to the main repo first. Ensure your custom version doesn't include code from unreleased versions or other mods without proper credit. Include me in the credits, and I reserve the right to incorporate your code into the base Tag with appropriate credit.

Contributing to the Repo:

Fork the repo 
here
 and contribute by creating pull requests.

Bug Reports and Suggestions:

Report bugs or suggestions 
here
.

Update Notifications:

You can make an account on this site here, and you'll be emailed for when this mod is updated!

Contact Information:

If you need to contact me, visit my profile 
here
.

Arena Map Support:

Yes, Tag supports arena maps and automatically adds pipes based on the CTF flags, and set your spawn to the Flag Tag flag spawn. For additional features like paintings, check out 
this repo
, where well-known arena maps are ported.

This simple mod lets you create groups to see the icon, name, health and location of the other group members in your own HUD.​

join-group [number] - Join to a group in the specified range.

leave-group - Leave the current group.

Mod Menu Options:
​

HUD Alpha - The transparency of the Team HUD.

Players per page - The amount of players displaying at the same time in the HUD (change the page with D-PAD UP and DOWN)

If you are using my other mod Super Chained Bros. the commands won't be enabled, as this mod works automatically with the group system of SCB (a crown will be displayed in the group leader). Also compatible with CS icons.

if (m.controller.buttonPressed & B_BUTTON) ~= 0 then

 mario_check_object_grab(m)

end

[B]

--the landing action can be used as ground pound!

[/B]

hook_mario_action(_G.ACT_LAND_NIL, act_land_NIL, INT_GROUND_POUND)

--add the rest of description here

[/DESCRIPTION]

{"Ok here is an actual description:

as you may have understood nil is a character fully based on flying!

in case you did not, here is a little recap:

Y button to fly

B to grab grabbable objects

and the landing from jump can be used as groundpound

--totally not op character?

dont worry, feel free to disable character movesets if you want, nil will maybe not complain.

they may fly but their ground moves are very limited.

they have many ingame quirks like random name and description and icon!

and maybe, they will even be abile to talk with you."}

--ps, they enjoy bhv_goomba for some reason

be sure to use latest CS when using this character

wanted.127.title: Wanted!
wanted.127.author: PeachyPeach
wanted.127.description:
Remember that 
New Super Mario Bros.
/
Super Mario 64 DS
 minigame?

This mod includes both a single player and a multiplayer version.

The goal is simple: the player has to find one of the four characters (Mario, Luigi, Wario or Toad) amongst a large crowd of the others.

You can play with a controller, but also with a mouse: bind your A button to the 
right
 click (not left), and you're ready to play!

Single player​
The default version. The player starts with 10 seconds and gain 5 seconds and 1 point each time they select the wanted character, but lose 10 seconds if they select any other one. The game ends when the player runs out of time.

Multiplayer​
This version is auto-enabled as soon as another player joins the game. Players have 30 seconds to find as many wanted characters as possible. Selecting the wanted character gives 1 point, but selecting any other one removes 1 point. The game ends when the timer reaches 0, and the player who has the most points win.

Settings​
Some commands to customize your game:

/wanted scores: View your single player high scores. Only the top 5 ones are saved.

/wanted settings: View the game settings.

Host only:

/wanted reset: Reset the game settings to their default value.

/wanted <setting> <value>: Change a setting before the game starts.

Settings are:

level_start: Starting level.

time_start: Starting time in seconds (single player).

time_max: Max time in seconds (single player).

time_bonus: Time gained in seconds (single player).

time_penalty: Time lost in seconds (single player).

time_multi: Duration in seconds of a multiplayer session.

Credits:

Authors
: PeachyPeach

warp-node-randomizer.767.title: Warp Node Randomizer
warp-node-randomizer.767.author: EmilyEmmi
warp-node-randomizer.767.description:
Are you tired of Super Mario 64 being sensible to navigate? This mod offers a new experience every time you play (sort of)! Now paintings could go anywhere, and warps can send you to other levels completely! But don't worry, use /warps to see a record of where everything leads. Also check the mod menu (Pause, and then press R, and you should see it) for options on which warps get randomized. Some ways to play this:

Get all 120 stars (It should be possible with coop, but let me know if you find an impossible seed),

Race with your friends to see who can find a given level first,

Do random seed speedruns (Now it's like Minecraft speedrunning! Better increase those Piglin Trade odds...),

See who can make the most warp discoveries,

Romhack support is available, but it's a bit buggy. Also credit to Blocky for some of the RNG-related code.

weather-cycle-dx.272.title: Weather Cycle DX
weather-cycle-dx.272.author: AgentX
weather-cycle-dx.272.description:
This mod adds a weather cycle system with cloudy skies, rain, and storms to sm64coopdx. It uses Day Night Cycle DX as a base library, meaning you need to have it enabled in order to use this mod. There is also a toggleable Aurora Borealis that starts after midnight. I've worked on this mod for months now and managed to optimize the storm to run at 200-300 microseconds, which is an impressive number especially compared to the earlier 6000 microseconds.

Special thanks to Floralys for the original concept.

Special thanks to eros71 for saving the mod!

if u see someone named xmario thats me on coop dx

CONTEROLLER RECOMMENDED

 
The moves: 

Twirl: Press x to twirl! depends on your speed level for height, and you only can't do it when in the water. Press z to cancel it, (can we used to chain wall jumps) and hold a to float(can go to EXTREME speeds if no joystick button is pressed).

Sunshine Dive: Spam b on the ground when diving to dive again with no interruption!

Ground Pound Dive: Press b when ground pounding to dive.

Long Pound: Hold z when landing a ground pound to long jump.

That's about it.

Full Potential
